Big Boy Bobby - Bobby for short - has never met a ball or person he doesn't like. Bobby is dog-social, sweet, and so very handsome. He'd love to play fetch with his new people, and wouldn't mind a well-matched dog sibling. At the very least, please bring him a home with a lot of balls - his very, very favorite - he will love to prance by you showing off his ball, wiggling his entire body, and then drop his ball and roll on top of it he's just that excited!


Come meet this big-headed, bigger-hearted guy asap - he's waiting for you!

name: Baby Acorn
description_html: She would do best in a home with one or more dogs as she seems to thrive with other dogs. She’s a tad nervous of the world, so having other confident dogs around her helps her not feel like the world is too scary! She’s loves to swim, snuggle and play with her foster brother. She does well in the crate, no issues! She takes a bit of time to trust and warm up to her humans, but once she does, she’s very affectionate and sweet. She doesn’t have a mean bone in her body! She also loves to fetch 💕

name: Velveteen
description_html:
Meet Velveteen ~

Here is the sweetest, gentlest, quietest lady in the room. She has distinctive features like a bunny hop in her trot, and no tail, earning her a sweet rabbit tale name. She loves to quietly watch life unfold, from a window view, or a patio.


She's spayed, vaccinated and heart worm negative. She's house trained and butter smooth on a leash. She's a great compact size, and combined with her good girl manners, she makes an easy fit in many home environments. She shares her space nicely with a large lady senior dog friend.


Velveteen has an advocacy group of volunteers - if you have questions, write us at caring@classiccanines.org

name: Ella
description_html:
Little Ella (after Fitzgerald, of course!) has been through a lot. She was one of over 50+ dogs seized recently in a hoarding case. She appears to have had multiple litters, so she was possibly in a puppy mill situation. Ella was one of the more traumatized dogs of the group. In any case, that's all in the past now and Ella is recovering in a loving foster home and learning to be a dog. Poor Ella seems to have spent her life in a cage so she freaks out if she's put in a crate and many things seem very new to her. She lives with the foster's two large male dogs and everyone gets along fine. So Ella could live with other dogs/pets possibly. Despite Ella's difficult start in life, she has never snapped or bitten or even shown her teeth. She is just nervous and needs a patient, experienced dog person to adopt her and give her the life she deserves because she is the PERFECT dog for someone!! She's only about 15 lbs so she is a great lap dog but also needs plenty of exercise. Fetch is her life. It's her job and she's very serious about it! She needs someone who will throw the ball for her every day. She has quickly been learning to walk on the leash and could possibly be a good running buddy eventually bc this girl is FAST!!


In only a few weeks in foster, Ella has come out of her shell a LOT and enjoys belly rubs now and short walks on the leash. With the right adopter, she will continue to relax and forget the past and blossom into herself. She would make a great companion for an active retired person or remote worker. She can be left alone in the house for a few hours at a time but really likes to be with her person, take naps and fetch. Due to her fear of loud noises and general anxiety, Ella is probably not a good candidate to live with children. Due to her small size, she could live in an apartment but needs a fenced area to fetch daily. She even enjoys fetching in the house too! :) The Schipperke breed is known for their intelligence and Ella could easily live on a farm where she could have room to run and follow


Potential adopters should read the breed characteristics of the Schipperke as they are a great description: https://www.akc.org/dog-breeds/schipperke/

They really describe Ella's personality: very serious and can be timid and overly cautious at first due to her trauma. But can you blame her? Humans have not been very good to her so far. But she's learning not all humans are bad!

name: Dandelion
description_html: Dandelion loves to cuddle! She's very people focused and enjoys having fun with whoever is hanging out with her. She's a playful, friendly girl who was brought in as a stray, but we can tell she had a home at some point. Dandelion is crate trained and mellow once she gets all her wiggles out. This fun girl is ready for a loving home today!

name: Rascal
description_html:
Meet Rascal—your future 60-pound lap dog!


Rascal is ready to leave his past behind and start the next chapter of his life with a loving forever family. This handsome boy is as easy going as they come and has quickly become a volunteer favorite.


Rascal walks beautifully on leash and enjoys relaxed strolls where he can take in the world by your side. He’s a loose-leash walker who makes walks a breeze. While he enjoys getting out and about, what Rascal really loves most is simply being near his people.


With his calm, even-keeled personality and affectionate nature, Rascal is the kind of dog who fits right in and makes every day a little brighter. And did we mention how handsome he is?


Rascal can’t wait to meet his forever family - maybe that’s you!

name: Nicholas
description_html:
Nicholas is a handsome pup whose striking black-and-white tuxedo markings—complete with the cutest freckles—are perfectly matched by his dapper and polite personality. As you can see from his bright, happy gaze and ready-for-action grin, he is a cheerful bundle of playfulness and affection. Nicholas is the ultimate social butterfly; he is incredibly loving and forms instant bonds with every human he meets. 

True to his lively nature, Nicholas’s favorite time is playtime. He's an expert-level toy enthusiast and has never met a squeaky toy or ball he didn't adore. While he has plenty of playful energy, he’s also a gentleman on outdoor adventures, handling nicely on a leash. 

If you are looking for a playful, loving, and well-mannered companion to bring endless joy to your home, this tuxedo-clad charm is waiting for you!

name: Maxine
description_html:
Maxine = Perfection!


She is a complete dream on leash and a perfect running buddy. Maxine is playful and enjoys chasing balls in the play yard. You want a cuddle bug? Perfect because she wants a lap to sit in and all the love you can give her!


She is a volunteer favorite, and her friends try to get all the other volunteers to meet her because "everyone should get to experience the absolute sweet, gentle, and kind love that will melt your heart from this girl".


Maxine is spayed, heartworm negative, and ready to walk out the door today!

name: Mojito
description_html: Look at that face! Meet Mojito, a splash of pure joy looking for his forever home. This striking boy instantly grabs your attention with his unique, captivating eyes—one beautiful blue, one warm brown. But it’s his massive, goofy smile and floppy ears that will truly steal your heart. Mojito is the ultimate enthusiast; he loves exploring the outdoors, leaning in close for affection, and flashing his signature grin for the camera. He’s a happy, active companion who brings bright, sunny energy wherever he goes. Ready to add a little extra flavor and endless love to your life? Mojito is your boy!

name: Pixie
description_html:
Pixie is a small bundle of sweetness looking for a cozy place to call home. This quiet, gentle girl is already showing how quickly she learns—she’s doing great practicing her leash walking and improving every day.


Pixie has a calm, easygoing personality and absolutely loves being close to her people. She happily allows nail trims and handles gentle care like a champ, showing just how trusting and well-mannered she is.


Her favorite thing in the world? Snuggling. Pixie would be thrilled to curl up beside you—or even better, right in your lap—for some quality cuddle time. If you’re looking for a soft-hearted companion who will happily keep you company and shower you with quiet affection, Pixie might be the perfect match.

name: Sardine
description_html:
Sardine (“Sar-Dean”) is a curious boy with an affinity for cuddles and petting, ceaseless play, and food of any kind! Despite being found alone at just three months old, he has quickly learned the luxuries of indoor life. Sardine does not only tolerate, but *enjoys*, the company of other cats and would likely feel the same way about children and dogs given enough time and reassurance - he is a single kitten that desperately NEEDS a playmate! Our favorite things about Sardine are that he dangles when you hold his upper body, he loves being held like a baby, he almost always sleeps in our bed, and he greets us at the door! He also has started to teach himself fetch with his favorite toucan-shaped toy (we have a video!) and has figured out the sound of the freezer opening in order to demand ice cubes to swat around the floor.


*Medical Status*

-Sardine has some ongoing loose stools which we are currently trying to resolve through a Hill's Science dry food diet. He has had a normal O&P and stool PCR.

-Sardine has a small umbilical hernia that likely does not need to be repaired. It doesn’t seem to bother him at all! 

-When found, Sardine had a partially degloved lower jaw and the small teeth at the front of his lower jaw were not present. His adult teeth have grown in, but these teeth have not appeared. It is likely that these teeth may never grow in, but he is able to eat wet and dry food and bite during play with no issues. 

-Sardine was found with ringworm, but it is gone! He has had two negative ringworm cultures (most recently on 06/05).

-Sardine was neutered 04/24.


Please reach out to hear more about Sardine!

name: Opie
description_html:
Meet Opie 💚

Opie is a happy, social boy who’s been making lots of friends lately—and winning hearts wherever he goes! He’s shown himself to be comfortable with new people, with no signs of shyness or sensitivity to touch. He’s just an easygoing, friendly pup who enjoys being around others.

Opie really lights up when he’s out of his kennel. Whether he’s heading out for a walk (where he does great on leash) or enjoying playtime in the yard with his favorite toys, he’s all about having fun and soaking up the moment.

In our short times in a mock living room, Opie has been a wonderful guest—non-destructive, curious, and eager to explore his surroundings. He especially loved lounging on the couch and trying to take in the view from the window, showing off his relaxed and cozy side.

With his combination of playful energy and laid-back charm, Opie is ready to fit right into a home where he can keep making friends, enjoying toys, and sharing plenty of happy moments.

name: Miss Pretty
description_html:
Happy is as happy does and Miss Pretty is a happy girl..however.. she's a little shy at first. Don't be surprised if standing in front of her kennel causes her to run and hide. She's worth the meet. You'll soon be on her friend's list. Ask staff to get her out, or if offsite, arrange a meet up with her advocates at caring@classiccanines.org. Need a meet up with a dog? That will be arranged too.


Miss Pretty has so much to offer:

--She'll never turn down a treat

--She loves comforts and is non-destructive

--She's very house trained , she's also crate trained

--She walks nicely on a leash, not bothered by other dogs

--Her favorite activities: window watching & extraordinary sniff walk skills

--Also a pro at riding in the car

--Perfect companionship

Fees are waived and there are support benefits from her team so you can focus on the important things,,spending time with your new dog.

name: Gypsy
description_html:
Gypsy is a polite little lady with lovely manners and a steady, easygoing nature. She’s wonderfully house trained, knows when it’s potty time, and enjoys following her nose through the grass like a tiny explorer on a mission. After a long day of fun adventure, she likes to sit back down, kick her feet up, and relax, making her a great friend to decompress with.

Gypsy can be a bit particular about her doggy friends, but she handles those moments with grace and tolerance.

Looking for a sweet soul with a whole lot of heart? Come meet Gypsy and let her charm her way right into your life!

name: Tiger
description_html:
Meet Tiger — professional snuggler, amateur fetch champion, and your future soul dog. (Seriously this guy has so much soul dog potential)

Tiger is the kind of dog who believes personal space is more of a suggestion than a rule. His love language? Oh, just all of them. Hugs, snuggles, cuddles — he loves to be close.

This young Lab mix has quickly become a volunteer favorite, mostly because it’s impossible to have a bad day when Tiger is around. He greets new people like long-lost friends and bonds fast — blink once and he’s already decided you’re his person.

He’s also got a playful side and is always up for a game of fetch (his technique is still evolving, but his enthusiasm is Olympic-level). And when the energy wears off, he’s right back to his true calling: cuddling like it’s a competitive sport.

Tiger seems house-trained and would likely thrive in a home where he can tag along on walks, hikes, or any adventure that ends with him curled up next to you on the couch. He’s equal parts explorer and couch companion — the best of both worlds. Whether your home is an apartment or a house with a yard, Tiger seems like he can fit into a lot of homes… as long as you’re ready to provide regular access to snuggles and affection.

name: Bunny
description_html:
Bunny came in with his litter mates when their owner could no longer afford to keep them. He's a sensitive soul and prefers to hide when things are stressful or loud. Bunny would do best in a low traffic, quiet home and may do well with cat friends.

It may take a little time to earn his trust, but once Bunny settles in we think he will make a very loyal and affectionate companion!

The adoption fee is waived for Bunny and ALL Desperate Housecats!

name: Ginger Lou
description_html:
Ginger recently arrived in our yard from parts unknown. She's a sweet babe, and she loves humans. We have a 7-year-old human, a 2-year-old family dog, and a 15-year-old cat. Ginger is enamored of the human, playful with the family dog, and curious about the cat from a safe distance.


Ginger's a young pup, so she's all potential. She needs exercise and attention to keep up with her appetite and social development. She's very quickly becoming crate trained, and she's excellent on a leash for her young age (no pulling and no leash aggression so far). Despite being chummy with the family dog, she's shown some food aggression and territorial behavior when family members show affection to the family dog. In our case, the family dog concedes without much of a tussle, but keep in mind that Ginger doesn't yet feel secure about having resources. She needs time and consistent, positive reinforcement.


If you're looking for a loyal, energetic, intelligent friend who brings joyful energy to your world, Ginger might just be the dog for you!

name: Koso
description_html: Looking for a sweet, social boy who loves dogs, humans, and healthy snacks? Meet Koso! 🥕🫐 This smart pup is a rapid-fire learner—he's already mastered stairs, car rides, and mid-air treat catching! He spends his days wrestling with his senior Husky foster brother and snoring softly by the home office desk. He’s currently working hard on his leash manners (the squirrels are just very distracting!), but he’s making progress every day. Reach out to find your new best friend! 🐾

name: Daisy
description_html:
Daisy is a super sweet. She does well with other dogs and loves to spend her day relaxing while every once in a while playing with the occasional toy. She was found with her (presumed) sister, Rosie, and we would prefer they be adopted together as they are quite attached.


She is house and crate trained. She can be a little anxious on a leash at first, but once she trusts you she will follow you anywhere. Overall just a great, sweet dog. Please give her a chance to show you!

name: Rosie
description_html:
Rosie is a very sweet girl. She’s great with other dogs, calm mannered and a couch potato! She was found with her (presumed) sister, Daisy, and we would prefer they be adopted together as they are quite attached.


She is house and crate trained. She can be a bit anxious on a leash at first but once she trusts you it’s easy for her to just walk next to you. Overall just a great, sweet dog. Please give her a chance to show you!

name: Cricket
description_html: Cricket is a confident, independent dog looking for someone to take him on adventures! He's easygoing, walks really nicely on his leash, and knows sit and will do it very patiently for a treat. He's a really smart guy that likes the company of other dogs, enjoys pets, and while he may try to sit in your lap, he's not going to be glued to you. Nope - this boy isn't a stage five clinger at all. He's easy peasy, playful, and curious (but watch out, squirrels!). Cricket really is the whole package and anyone would be lucky to scoop up this uniquely handsome dude.

name: Kitty
description_html:
Kitty is the kind of dog who turns heads the moment you meet her. Her tall, perky ears stand straight up like little exclamation points, always ready to catch the sound of a friendly voice or the rustle of something interesting. She has a gentle, sweet demeanor that makes you feel instantly at ease, and you can tell there’s so much personality just waiting to blossom once she finds her person.

She carries a large scar along her back, a quiet reminder that her start in life wasn’t easy. Kitty can’t tell us what she’s been through, but what’s remarkable is how she refuses to let her past dim her view of people. She greets the world with hope, softness, and a willingness to trust again.

On walks, Kitty begins with enthusiasm, then settles into a slower pace where she can take in the world—sniffing the breeze, watching the scenery, and enjoying the simple pleasure of being outside with someone she likes. Her favorite spot on campus is the Real Life Room, where she melts into snuggles and shows us exactly what she’s dreaming of: a home of her own.

Kitty is a world-class cuddler. She loves chin scratches, gives the sweetest hugs, and has mastered the art of climbing onto a chair just to be closer to you for more affection. She’s tender, observant, and endlessly loving.

Kitty is ready for someone who sees her not for the scar on her back, but for the bright, beautiful future she’s eager to share. If you’re looking for a loyal companion with a gentle soul and a heart full of love, Kitty is waiting to meet you.

name: Earl
description_html: Earl is a shy boy looking for a better life than the one he had on the streets. He's gentle and loving and enjoys pets. Earl has made immediate friends with his Cactus Cat compadres in the shy kitty program, so he may do well in a home with feline friends. He may need a slow start in a new place, but this affectionate boy has a lot of love to give and we don't think it will take him long to blossom and relax in a real home!

name: Hooza Goodboy (Louie)
description_html:
Meet Hooza — apply to meet him!

No pressure to adopt after the meet & greet. Feel free to reach out to me directly ~ equin@virginia.edu

Big, handsome guy with a soft, calm, and snuggly personality

Loves:

  • Lounging on the couch
  • Cuddling
  • Quiet companionship
  • Napping (with adorable soft snores)

Easygoing lifestyle:

  • Enjoys slow, relaxed walks
  • Likes to stop and observe the world
  • Happy to sit and people-watch for hours

Very gentle:

  • Never pulls on the leash
  • Walks right beside you
  • Takes treats softly and carefully

Dog-friendly:

  • Does well with other dogs
  • Especially great with calm, gentle dogs

Well-trained & low-maintenance:

  • Housetrained & leash trained
  • Great in apartments
  • Comfortable staying home alone
  • Not picky with food; takes meds easily

Personality at home:

  • Greets you with a wagging tail
  • Prefers cuddles over walks
  • Loves sleeping in bed with you (or nearby)
  • Best fit:Calm, low-key home
  • Someone who loves a quiet, gentle companion

----

Conoce a Hooza — ¡aplica para conocerlo!

Sin compromiso de adoptar después de conocerlo.

Perro grande y guapo con una personalidad dulce, tranquila y cariñosa

Le encanta:

  • Descansar en el sofá
  • Acurrucarse
  • La compañía tranquila
  • Dormir (¡ronca suavemente!)

Estilo de vida relajado:Paseos tranquilos y sin prisa

  • Le gusta observar su entorno
  • Feliz viendo pasar gente y perros

Muy gentil:

  • Nunca tira de la correa
  • Camina a tu lado
  • Toma premios con mucho cuidado

Bueno con otros perros:

  • Se lleva bien con otros perros
  • Especialmente con perros tranquilos y calmados

Bien educado y fácil de cuidar:

  • Entrenado para hacer sus necesidades afuera
  • Sabe caminar con correa
  • Ideal para apartamentos
  • Puede quedarse solo en casa sin problema
  • No es exigente con la comida; toma medicina fácilmente

En casa:

  • Te recibe moviendo la cola
  • Prefiere abrazos antes que paseos
  • Le gusta dormir contigo o cerca

Hogar ideal:

  • Tranquilo y sin mucho movimiento
  • Con alguien que valore su carácter dulce y calmado

name: Cookie
description_html: Cookie might have a lil cutesy name but this guy is super distinguished - some might even say he's more of a Biscuit, if you'd consider him a proper British lad. ;) Cookie takes treats gently, loves to take a "sniffari" aka sniffy walk, and is housetrained. Plus this handsome man has the best curly tail (see photos) anyone has ever seen. At the shelter, Cookie politely shares his space with another pup - such a gentleman. Come meet Sir Cookie please - he's ready for you!

name: Lila
description_html: Lila is a bouncy lady who loves snuggles. She enjoys treats and will sit calmly by your side after she has gotten her wiggles out. Lila loves playing fetch and would do well having a yard for exercise or a plan for walks on leash. She's an excellent walking companion, too! Lila is housetrained and knows to "sit" for treats. This smart girl is just beginning her journey and is looking for a loving adopter to join her!

name: Ruffles
description_html: Warning! This dog may appear shorter and cuter in person! She has a lot of spunk, may even belly flop into any amount of water outside. This retired mama acts very ladylike in home. She settles her barking quick once knowing you. She loves snuggles, diving headfirst into your chest. Once you show her love, so will she in return. Loves toys, has shown no mouthing on furniture or structures in home, except 2 socks… loves squeaky toys. Will seek being close to you in a storm. Prefers women.

name: Felicia
description_html:
Felicia has been in need of a fresh start in life to provide her the comforts and privileges of an indoors dog. She and her dog family spent a few hard years being exposed to the weather. It's time for a safe "happily ever after". While waiting for her silver lining, Felicia was welcomed to a foster home where she's getting reacquainted with an indoors lifestyle. She's gentle, sweet and easy, rides well in a car and walks nicely on a leash. She’s learning how to play but prefers to follow her people around and snuggle any chance she gets. She's very polite to cats both indoors and outdoors, and is sharing a home with a very cute small older dog friend. She would probably enjoy a friendly, polite dog she can snuggle and play with. She's shown herself to be a well rounded lady.

Here's a chance to make real change in a life where it will be so very appreciated. She will repay you in doggie kisses and loyalty to be your companion and family pet.

name: Angel
description_html:
Brawn AND brains? Yes, please. 💙

This sweet girl is the total package—affectionate, smart, and full of personality. She lives for love and will happily trade treats for cuddles any day. Expect lots of kisses, snuggles, and her signature wiggle butt when she’s showing off her skills!

✔️ Knows: sit, down, stop, come, paw

✔️ Fully potty trained

✔️ Crate trained (just prefers not to be left too long)

✔️ Super people-focused and eager to please

She gets the cutest little wrinkles when she’s waiting for praise—because attention is her favorite reward.

On leash, she’s a strong girl and can pull, so she’ll benefit from some continued training—but she’s smart and motivated, so she’s a great candidate to learn quickly.

If you’re looking for a loyal, loving, and fun companion who wants to be your shadow and your snuggle buddy, she’s your girl.

Come meet her—you’ll fall in love fast. 🐾💙

name: Bluebelle
description_html:
Meet Bluebelle — a gentle, growing soul who is just beginning to discover the world around her. Coming from a hoarding situation, everything is still new to her, and she’s learning step by step what it means to feel safe and cared for.

Bluebelle may not fully understand affection just yet, but she’s making steady, heartwarming progress. She’s started to approach familiar people for polite sniffs and will happily accept a few treats, showing her curiosity and quiet bravery. Each day, she’s building confidence and learning to trust a little more.

One thing that brings her joy is playing with her sister, Lulabelle. Their bond is special, and Bluebelle often looks to her for comfort and reassurance as they explore life together. Because of this, she may do best in a home where they can be adopted together, continuing their journey side by side.

Bluebelle is looking for a patient, understanding home that will celebrate her small victories and give her the time she needs to blossom. Watching her grow and come out of her shell will be a truly rewarding experience.

name: Linda Lou
description_html:
Meet Linda Lou 💕🐾

Well hello there, darling — I’m Linda Lou, and yes, I’m every bit as charming as my name sounds.

I’m a sweet girl with a gentle heart and a loving soul. I am very shy when it comes to meeting new people but am working on my bravery. My favorite things in life are soft beds, kind humans, tasty treats, and being told I’m pretty (which I will gladly accept at any hour of the day). I’ve got a calm, affectionate nature.

I’m the kind of dog who wants to be part of your everyday life. Morning coffee companion? That’s me. Couch cuddle supervisor? Absolutely. Loyal best friend who listens without judgment? I was born for it.

I may take a little time to settle into new situations, but once I know I’m safe and loved, my personality blossoms beautifully. Underneath it all is a dog who simply wants connection, comfort, and someone to love forever.

Here’s what you should know about me:

  • I give world-class cuddle energy
  • I have a heart as soft as my puppy-dog eyes
  • I’m happiest just being near my people
  • I will absolutely become your little shadow

I’ve been dreaming about a forever home where I can finally exhale, feel safe, and spend my days loving the humans lucky enough to choose me.

If you’re looking for a loyal companion with sweetness, grace, and just a sprinkle of sass, I think we should meet.

Love,

Linda Lou 🐶💗

name: Evan
description_html:
Meet Evan 💙

Evan is a gentle, sweet boy who has made wonderful progress building his confidence during his time at the shelter. Watching him come out of his shell has been such a joy—he truly wants to connect and be close to his people.

This handsome pup is a dream on leash, walking calmly by your side without pulling. He’s also very treat-motivated and already knows how to sit, which makes continuing his training both easy and fun.

Evan can still be a little sensitive to touch at first, but he’s trying so hard—leaning in, learning to trust, and showing more comfort every day. It’s clear he wants affection and is figuring out how to enjoy it at his own pace. He’s done great meeting new people, including a recent introduction to a new volunteer, where he showed just how far he’s come.

With a little patience and a lot of love, Evan is going to blossom into an incredibly loyal and affectionate companion. If you’re looking for a kind-hearted dog to grow with, Evan is ready to meet you.

name: Sushi
description_html: Sushi is shy to open up, but once she does, she's a lovebug! She's a great mix of cuddler and independent. For some parts of the day she likes to hide/do her own thing, but generally when I'm home, she's interactive. She's one of my favorite fosters ever!!! A great kitty. LOVES to eat. Likes to play too!

name: Milo
description_html: Cleo & Milo had to be surrendered to the shelter when their older owner could no longer care for them. They are both very loving and easy going pups! They beam with excitement when they get to go on an outing with friends. Cleo & Milo are laid back for walks and mostly just like getting cuddles from people and playing with toys. And, they won't turn down a treat or chew if offered. This pair have so much affection and joy to bring to a home, they just need an chance to share it! Cleo & Milo love each other very much and should be adopted together. Ask to meet these cuties today!

name: Cleo
description_html: Cleo & Milo had to be surrendered to the shelter when their older owner could no longer care for them. They are both very loving and easy going pups! They beam with excitement when they get to go on an outing with friends. Cleo & Milo are laid back for walks and mostly just like getting cuddles from people and playing with toys. And, they won't turn down a treat or chew if offered. This pair have so much affection and joy to bring to a home, they just need an chance to share it! Cleo & Milo love each other very much and should be adopted together. Ask to meet these cuties today!

name: Buddy
description_html:
Buddy and his friends were found abandoned in a crate by a community member. His friends have all since been adopted, but extra shy Buddy is still here. He will need a patient adopter willing to take it slowly with him and let him transition to a new home at his own pace. With a little TLC and calm, consistent confidence building, this boy will go far and can be a loyal companion for all your days!

Buddy has joined our Cactus Cats to get extra attention from volunteers through positive reinforcement clicker training. Since he enjoys cat companionship, he may do best in a home with a social, friendly cat to show him how to trust people.

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Buddy and ALL Desperate Housecats/Cactus Cats!

name: Poppy
description_html: I am a wiggly happy little puppy. Shy at first but very cuddly and playful once I'm comfortable. I like other dogs, even the big ones! Kitties are okay too. I'm eager to learn and happy to make my owners happy too!

name: Woody
description_html:
Woody is the sweetest dog. He's very gentle and careful, even when playing, and is great with kids of all ages. He loves tug of war and will politely bring a toy so you can play. Or he drops one so you can throw it for him! He is house trained and will wait by the door to go outside or make a little squeak to remind you it's time to go. Woody rarely barks and never at other dogs but is loud when you need him. Woody came to us severely underweight but after a little time with his foster he's fully healthy! He would be a lovable addition to any home, with or without children or pets.


Email me if you have any questions: austfosts@gmail.com

name: Gus
description_html:
Meet Gus — a 12/10 good boy who’s ready to bring joy, laughs, and lots of love into his forever home!

Gus is incredibly friendly with both people and other dogs. He’s playful and fun, but also thoughtful—he’s great at adjusting his energy to match his canine buddies, whether they’re ready to romp or just hang out.

He’s still a young guy at heart and gets excited to say hello, so he’s working on keeping all four paws on the ground. Because of that enthusiasm, he may do best with older kids while he continues learning his manners.

Gus loves getting out for a nice long walk (about a mile is his sweet spot), and he’s a dream on leash with his Easy Walk harness. When the day winds down, he’s just as happy curling up next to you on the couch for some quality cuddle time.

He’s a total star at home too—crate trained, no potty accidents, and not destructive. He understands “no,” settles in easily, and even handles mealtime and bedtime in his crate without a fuss. His only quirk? He sometimes likes to start the day a little early—but he makes up for it with enthusiasm and tail wags!

Bonus: Gus loves ice cubes—they’re his favorite treat.

Gus would thrive in a home with another playful dog and an active family who can give him a couple of good walks each day. If you’re looking for a sweet, fun-loving companion who’s equal parts adventure buddy and cuddle bug, Gus might just be your perfect match.

name: Roux
description_html: Roux was on his own for quite some time. He was staying on an abandoned property in east Austin. Neighbors slowly made friends and Roux went directly into foster with a neighbor. He is shy at first, but opens up to people quickly. He loves people, treats, and affection. Roux is a laid back dog that loves to hang out in the yard, snuggle, or play with his people. He is house trained and is learning all the tricks. He’s a very smart boy!

name: Foxy
description_html: Foxy is a highly intelligent puppy! She is excellent with kids and also loves to be held. She adapts very well to other dogs.

name: Kash
description_html: Kash is an easy boy for walks and he loves hanging out with people! This friendly guy enjoys playing with toys and will gladly come up to you for pets and reassurance. He's more than ready to get attention daily in a foster or adoptive home today!

name: Buckwheat
description_html:
Meet Buckwheat 🤎

Buckwheat is a gentle soul who’s still finding his footing in the busy shelter environment. All the sights and sounds can be a bit overwhelming for him—but once he gets a chance to relax, his sweet and silly personality really starts to shine.

Out in a play yard, Buckwheat is an absolute delight. He loves to stretch his legs with little joyful runs during his breaks, showing off a playful side that’s sure to make you smile. Despite the stress of shelter life, he’s been impressively well-mannered and appears to be very housetrained.

Buckwheat is a quiet, laid-back boy who would much prefer a calm, peaceful setting where he can decompress at his own pace. On leash, he can be a bit nervous at first, but you’ll notice him relax more and more as you move away from the shelter environment.

What stands out most about Buckwheat is his heart—you can tell he truly wants to connect and accept love, even while he’s still building confidence. The best way to win him over is simple: patience, kindness, and letting him come to you when he’s ready.

In the right home, Buckwheat is going to blossom into a loyal, loving companion who will make every bit of that patience worth it.

name: Hobbes
description_html: Hobbes is perfect with a capital P. He doesn’t react to dogs, birds, or squirrels on walks. He walks alongside you with a loose leash. He LOVES cuddles and pets more than anything else. Hobbes would probably live happily in an apartment; he's quiet and small-sized, and really just wants to snuggle with people. Hobbes is a social butterfly waiting for his new friends to invite him to happy hour!

name: Benny
description_html:
Benny is such a fun, spunky guy! He likes other dogs, loves to play with toys, and is super smart. In fact, one volunteer was just about able to teach him to sit in about 3 minutes! (We say "just about able" because it takes routine practice, but Benny definitely got the idea and we know he'd learn even more tricks very quickly because he's a super smart cookie and is treat motivated!)


Benny is hoping for an adopter who loves to explore and adventure and will bring him along for the fun. He'd also be a great wingman if you need one - Benny loves everyone he meets!

name: Pasey
description_html:
Pasey is a sweet, playful pup who is learning how to interact with people after coming from a hoarding case of over 30 dogs.


  • Is he nervous? Yep.
  • Does the poor guy shake in his kennel and hide in the corner when people try to come up to him? Also yes.


But when you take him to a yard, he immediately gets zoomies and hops around like a bunny. He is starting to let his best friends show him a little affection in the form of pets. If his best volunteer friend runs around the yard, he joins in on the fun. When you try to leave the play yard he comes right up to the gate to go with you. During kennel return this guy likes to get near his handlers when they try to leave. This poor guy has given us every indication that he wants to learn how to be loved, he just needs a family that will give him a chance to learn how to do that.


This sweet soul is neutered, heartworm negative, and ready to go into a home today and finally get the chance to experience true love.

name: Gypsy
description_html:
A family lifestyle with dogs, cats and 2 children suited Gypsy beautifully.

As a cultured lady she knows her manners, her sit, stay, and she walks nicely on a leash and is house trained.

Her favorite things? Cuddles, walks, play and all things affectionate and loving

Gypsy is vaccinated, microchipped, heart worm negative, and spayed and although large, she's a shorter stature and has room to drop a few pounds

See her short video of when she was getting familiar with the shelter.

Gypsy is going to make a lucky family very happy.

She's advocated for by ClassicCaninesATX who provide an extra layer of tailored support for the mature dogs. Use her link to reach to reach out for questions or a meet up.

name: Evie
description_html:
Evie is a confident, cuddly puppy who radiates joy. Her adorably big ears, beautiful hazel eyes, & ever-wagging tail, combined with her happy demeanor, make her incredibly charming.


Through the guidance of her two canine foster siblings, she is learning basic dog etiquette and is remarkably open to training. Her burning desire to befriend the household cat has met with resistance from said cat, but she makes herself as small as possible in his presence, and I believe she will eventually win him over.


Evie is crate-trained, sits for treats & meals, and is happy to follow whatever the group is doing. She is working on potty training and walking on a leash without getting distracted. She has a big bark for such a little dog, but quiets down once she is reassured that all is well. She is eager to spend time with people & other dogs, and reads social cues well.


She is affectionate, happily flopping into the arms of anyone willing, and is about the best couch nap partner you could find. The game she likes best so far is chasing water sprayed from the hose - which happens to be a very low effort means of tiring her out and watering the yard simultaneously.


Evie is very young and full of energy, so she will still need some patience, training, and supervision, but the rewards of having such a smart, sweet dog in your life will make it all worthwhile.

name: Inspector Tater Tot
description_html:
Inspector Tater Tot was living at a RV park and camp site for the past several years. He is definitely used to his freedom and may enjoy an indoor/outdoor or catio lifestyle. He's curious, calm and enjoys pets in moderation.

When he's not solving crimes, like the infamous case of the missing Churu, the Inspector enjoys lounging, eating snacks, birding, and nature walks. He has completed his latest investigation into campsite living, and is now ready to explore home options!

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Inspector Tater Tot and ALL Desperate Housecats/Cactus Cats!

name: Cookyz N Cream
description_html:
Cookyz N Cream is the sweetest big guy! Just like his name suggests, he is the perfect blend of charming good looks (the cutest freckles!) and an ultra-smooth, chill personality. This handsome fella has a striking face and soulful eyes that will instantly melt your heart.

He excels at loose-leash walking, making outdoor strolls a breeze. When he is not enjoying a relaxed walk, he loves nothing more than turning into a giant, cuddly, affectionate dog. He knows some commands like “sit” and is ready to learn more! This scrumptious pup is ready for his forever!

name: Cinnamon
description_html: Cinnamon was abandoned at a rescue and then brought to us for care. She was shy at first, but now she's showing us her active, playful side and telling us she's done with kennel life! This girl is ready to do zoomies around a home. Cinnamon loves Churu, so that may be the best way to make introductions. She enjoys pets and once she's in a calm home setting, we think that's when she will truly blossom! So add some spice to your life and adopt Cinnamon today!

name: Princess
description_html:
Princess is a sweet girl ready to rule your heart! She deserves the royal treatment (but is actually pretty low-maintenance), which to her means plenty of cuddles and affection. She has the most radiant, happy smile and a beautiful coat.

Princess strikes the perfect balance of being easygoing around the house while still showing off a charming, playful side. She is highly treat-motivated and already knows how to "sit" perfectly. This smart pup is eager to learn even more tricks in exchange for her favorite snacks. Ready to add some charm to your life? Princess is the one!

name: Zuri
description_html: Meet Zuri! She's an explorer and loves getting involved in a good search and rescue of squeaky toys and hidden treats. Zuri loves to snuggle and gets comfort from her friends at the shelter. Once this fun girl is out of her kennel and doing zoomies, having a good time with people and getting all the love, the last place she wants to go back to is a kennel! Can you give Zuri the gift of a shelter break? Adopt or foster this special lady today!

name: Ryder
description_html:
Quick summary:

1. Wonderful gentle boy, great with all family members (humans, dogs and cats). No behavior issues. Very affectionate, well behaved, house-trained and crate-trained.

2. Ryder is a strong and confident working dog. He needs a handler who is experienced with working/guardian breeds, and can provide him with structure/training, as well as calm and confident leadership.

3. Ryder loves playing with other dogs. He'll be perfect for someone who already has a playful dog(s) and is looking for a loyal companion dog to add to the pack.


The Long version:

Say hello to Ryder — the ultimate goodest-good boy, and quite possibly the most lovable German Shepherd you'll ever meet. At 3.5 years old, he's past the puppy phase and has arrived in his prime: gentle, playful, and deeply affectionate to the people he loves.

A true social butterfly. Ryder loves socializing - adults, kids, other dogs, cats. The moment he meets someone, he treats them like a long-lost friend. Ryder gets along with everyone and is wonderfully gentle across the board. Whether you're a busy family or a single owner, he'll fit right in and make everyone feel like his favorite person.

The world's best leaner. Ryder's love language is physical touch. He'll nudge his head under your arm, lean his whole body against you, and look up at you like you hung the moon. Fair warning: he will absolutely stage a pouty little tantrum if he doesn't get his cuddles. It's dramatic. It's adorable. You've been warned. 😄

Calm inside, a blast outside. Ryder has mastered the art of balance. Indoors, he's easygoing and relaxed — happy to lounge while you go about your day. But out in the playfield? He transforms into a joyful, zoomie-running, chase-loving goofball. A few solid walks a day keep him perfectly happy, making him a great fit for a wide range of lifestyles.

Brilliantly well-mannered. Ryder is sharp as a tack and eager to please. He responds quickly to direction, listens when told no, and is fully crate trained — he actually runs himself into his crate at mealtimes and bedtime with zero prompting. He's also completely comfortable being handled, making grooming and vet visits a breeze.

Champion level crate training. Ryder is secure and settled when left on his own. No drama, no destruction — just a patient, good boy waiting for you to come back. He loves running into his crate himself when it's meal time or sleep time at night.

His story. Ryder's previous owners didn't give him the care he deserved — he came to us underweight and in need of some TLC. But he's already making up for lost time, enjoying three meals a day complete with scrambled eggs and a peanut butter dessert. 🥜 Despite his past, he holds no grudges and greets life — and people — with an open heart. What he needs most is a calm, confident leader who will give him the stability and love he's always deserved. In return, he will repay you with unwavering loyalty, endless snuggles, and more kisses than you'll know what to do with.

If you're looking for a well-behaved, affectionate companion with a heart of gold — Ryder is your guy. He's not just looking for a home. He's looking for his person.

Could that be you?

name: Mickey
description_html: Mickey is the sweetest, most playful little guy! Don’t let his short legs fool you, he’s a pro at fetch and loves long walks. Mickey is very smart and confident- he knows sit, down, stay, shake, roll over, spin, beg, heel and is quickly picking up other commands. He might be a bit of a genetic mystery but he definitely has a some working dog in him and is eager to please his human. He has the brains of a cattle dog in an adorable pint sized body. He will do anything you ask him to for treats! We’ve found he can be excitable around new people and dogs, but with more obedience training and exposure to new environments he is doing better every day. Once he trusts you he is the absolute sweetest boy. Mickey has plenty of energy for any kind of new adventure, but he’s also down to curl up on the couch with his people. He is housetrained, can stay in a crate, non-destructive indoors, and loves bath time. Just an all around good boy!

name: Leo
description_html: Meet Are you looking for a companion to go on walks or out on the town with? Leo is your man! He walks nicely when wearing an Easy Walk harness and is non-reactive to dogs, squirrels, or people, when out and about. He's cat and dog friendly and loves people! He's super smart and knows sit, paw, other paw, sit/stay, down, and even learned how to open a sensor trash can:). Sweet Leo is stressed in the kennel, but a dream in a home. Can you be the kind person to change Leo's life? Come meet this handsome boy.

name: Emmylou
description_html: It may take her a little while for her to warm up but when she does she welcomes pets and will be your best buddy. She is great on leash, a gentle treat taker and she is very house trained. She does have a playful side to her but you may not see that right away. Anyone considering Emmy Lous should be patient and go at her pace.

name: Boo
description_html: Boo showed up as a stray in the community and was brought to the shelter when their foster could no longer care for them. She did well with older, calmer dogs in her temporary home. Boo is a smart girl who knows "sit" & "come", and she's friendly with people even on first meetings. She's very much a "people lover" and just wants to be close to her special humans. Her cute, playful side also comes out and she enjoys romping around with her squeaky toys. The only thing Boo is afraid of is not getting into a home ASAP!

name: Howard Butts
description_html:
Meet Howard E Butts.  Howard was found roaming around the local Dollar Tree.  Unfortunately, Howard's bank account was empty, but he found a nice lady that lured him to the car with cold sausages. As his name implies, he is a true Texan, and a true lover of ALL groceries. 


Howard has been enjoying time with his foster brothers Jonah (a human) and George Bailey (a dog that thinks he’s human.)  He loves walks in the hood, and a couch cuddle right after.  He knows what “go potty,” “sit,” “bedtime,” “dinner,” and “treat,” all mean… and he doesn’t miss a meal. 


Howard loves people, and dogs.  He loves sharing water and toys, but prefers dinner alone.  He is fast, but is easily recalled. Howard loves getting a little alone time, sleeping in his crate at night. His foster mom and dad love snuggling him, and would love to see him go to a home where he gets outdoor time, snuggles, and maybe has a sibling or two, though he also would be cool with alone time.

name: Palomo
description_html: Palomo is a stunning husky/shepherd mix with a smile that will melt your heart! True to his name, this handsome boy is as sweet and gentle as a dove. Palomo is the perfect blend of playfulness and affection; he loves a good romp around the yard just as much as he loves leaning in for full-body cuddles. With his striking ears, expressive eyes, and a tail that never stops wagging, he radiates pure joy. If you’re looking for a loyal, fun-loving companion to brighten your days and join you on every adventure, Palomo is ready to be your forever best friend!

name: Spike
description_html:
Spike is the definition of a loyal, loving companion. If you’re looking for a dog who will happily curl up right next to you on the couch and soak up all the pets and affection, Spike is your guy. He absolutely loves being close to his people and has a calm, comforting presence that makes him the perfect best friend.


He’s currently working on leash training and doing great—each day he’s growing more confident and walking better. While he can be a little shy at first, Spike is adjusting quickly in his foster home and just needs a little patience and love to fully shine.


Spike has been doing an excellent job with pottying outside and is building great habits. He also has a healthy, enthusiastic appetite—mealtime is one of his favorite parts of the day!


His energy level is just right: not too hyper, not too lazy. He enjoys some activity but is just as happy relaxing and hanging out with you.


If you’re looking for a sweet, affectionate dog who will be your shadow and your snuggle partner, Spike is ready to meet you and steal your heart.

name: Shadow
description_html: Shadow and Midnight came in together and would LOVE a home together. They were exposed to FeLV but have tested negative for the virus. They will just need a retest on 6/25/26 to check their status. These girls love to cuddle up with each other; they are friendly and playful and super cute together. They just don’t seem to care for other cats. They are available for adoption & foster and we’d love to see them get outta here!

name: Midnight
description_html: Shadow and Midnight came in together and would LOVE a home together. They were exposed to FeLV but have tested negative for the virus. They will just need a retest on 6/25/26 to check their status. These girls love to cuddle up with each other; they are friendly and playful and super cute together. They just don’t seem to care for other cats. They are available for adoption & foster and we’d love to see them get outta here!

name: Hensen
description_html:
Meet Hensen — a lovable pup with a heart full of love and a tail that never stops wagging.


Hensen is the kind of dog who makes every day a little brighter. This sweet boy loves spending time with his people, whether that means going for walks, relaxing on the couch, or simply being nearby soaking up attention and affection.


He may take a moment to settle into new surroundings, but once he trusts you, Hensen becomes a loyal companion who just wants to love and be loved. With his gentle personality and soulful eyes, it’s impossible not to fall for him.


Why Hensen is special:

• Sweet, affectionate, and loyal

• Loves attention and companionship

• Ready for adventures and cuddle time alike

• Knows sit, stay, down, come, shake/paw


Hensen has so much love left to give, and he’s hoping to find someone who will give him the safe, happy life he deserves. If you’re looking for a best friend with a big heart, Hensen might just be your perfect match.


Hensen is neutered, heart worm negative, and ready to walk out the door today!


Come meet Hensen — he’s ready to find his forever home.

name: Lilac
description_html:
This sweet petite girl loves to play--especially hunting games! She is acrobatic in pursuit of the feather at the end of her cat fishing pole toy. She also LOVES treats of all kinds and catnip--she will roll around in ecstasy when a little catnip is rubbed on her cloth "carrot" toy.

This girl is also tiny--weighing only 7.5 lbs. and she moves like a dainty ballerina when she poses on her window perch to watch the squirrels outside.

She's confident around people she doesn't know as long as they respect her boundaries and let her make the first move. She wants to be the one to give consent (and who doesn't?).

This quiet little kitty would make an excellent companion and likely would do well in a multi-cat household.

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Lilac and ALL Desperate Housecats!

name: Penelope
description_html:
We don’t use the word “perfect” lightly, but Penelope comes pretty close.


This sweet 7-month-old girl is blind and partially deaf, but you’d hardly know it. Penelope experiences the world through shadows, touch, scent, memory, and pure determination and she navigates life with incredible confidence and joy. Her impairments are simply a birth defect and not a medical concern; she just needs a family willing to guide her as she learns new spaces and routines. She learns FAST.


During time spent in volunteer and staff homes, Penelope picked up on potty training quickly and has already started responding to touch signals. She’s smart, adaptable, and eager to connect with her people. Like any puppy, she’s still learning every day, but she approaches life with curiosity and resilience.


Most importantly, Penelope is pure love. She’s cuddly, playful, affectionate, and happiest when she’s close to her humans. And that face? One look and your heart is hers forever.


Penelope didn’t choose to come into the world with odds stacked against her, but she has never let them define her. She’s overcome every obstacle thrown her way and is now ready for a forever home filled with patience, kindness, and all the love she so deeply deserves.

name: Baby Girl
description_html:
Meet Baby Girl — a sweet, goofy girl with a playful spirit and a heart full of love. She’s dog-friendly, crate trained, and house trained, making her a wonderful companion for a variety of homes. Baby Girl loves to play, cuddle, and soak up affection — she truly loves love.

She may take a minute to warm up to new people, but once she does, she’ll be your biggest fan, showering you with loyalty and affection. In her previous home, she lived with a smaller dog and absolutely loved having a buddy to play with.

Baby Girl’s past wasn’t always kind — she was left outside alone for long periods until a caring neighbor stepped in to help her. Despite that, she’s remained gentle, loving, and full of joy. Now, she’s ready for a forever home where she can feel safe, cherished, and included.

If you’re looking for a cuddly, playful companion who will blossom into a devoted best friend, Baby Girl might just be your perfect match.

name: Mazda
description_html:
Meet Mazda, a cute three-year-old who has a soft spot for belly rubs and cuddles. Volunteers and Staff consistently say that Mazda is so sweet. We know that she will win your heart over, too!

Mazda would love to go on hikes or take long walks. Mazda likes playing fetch with a toy and also likes her downtime with human affection and pets.

Adopting a pup like Mazda offers the opportunity to skip the demanding puppy phase while still having a young, trainable companion ready to bond and explore life with you. Mazda is ready to start her new leash on life with her forever family and hopes that you come do a meet and greet today!

name: Gucci
description_html:
Gucci is a floofy big boy who is easygoing and sweet.  He loves giving affection to people, is cuddly, and is very easy to walk on a leash.  He seems a little interested in toys, but enjoys his walks and lounging around more.  

Gucci currently goes to playgroup and lives with another dog, so he could potentially fit into a home with another dog after a meet and greet at the shelter.  Come meet Gucci and see if he’s the one!

name: Ace
description_html: Meet Ace! Part-time comedian, full-time good boy. Ace is kennel trained, potty trained, dog-friendly, and professionally certified in cuddling. Whether he’s making new dog friends, soaking up the sunshine, or dramatically flopping over for belly rubs, Ace brings fun wherever he goes. If you’re looking for a best friend with a big personality and an even bigger heart, Ace is your guy.

name: Oak
description_html: This handsome, smart boy loves to cuddle with his foster family. He’s also perfectly happy hanging out with our large dog and other cats. Curious, playful, and fun, Oak is always ready for his next adventure. 🐾💙

name: Sparkle
description_html: The sweetest, most gentle kitten. She is the smallest of her litter and still very tiny. A huge lap kitten who loves cuddles and attention. She would thrive in a home where she can get lots of love and one-on-one time. 🩷🐾

name: Charlie
description_html:
Isn't he a darling handsome grand boy? Big at heart, and an easy going manner will bring a sense of calm to your home. See his short video here.

He's very housetrained, nice to walk on a leash (but watch out lizards and squirrels!), he's happy to play a short game of fetch. He prefers to not have to eat alone and loves a view to the outside world and would love your companionship. He was mascot to a volunteer enrichment exercise and was said to be like a therapy dog for all. He's very social and loves everyone equally.

Have a dog friend at home for Charlie? Schedule a doggie meet up with staff.

Charlie is advocated for by his friends at ClassicCaninesATX which means his adopters get extra support for supplies and care with his adoption. Don't delay when a good boy is waiting in a shelter.

name: Lil Luna
description_html:
Hi there! I’m Lil Luna — a pocket-sized bundle of love with a heart way bigger than my paws. 🌙✨

I may be little, but my personality is larger than life! I’m sweet, playful, and always ready to make you smile with my goofy antics and happy wiggles. Whether I’m zooming around the yard, snuggling up beside you, or giving you my big soulful eyes, I know how to make every moment brighter.

I can be a little shy when meeting new people, but give me a little patience and kindness, and I’ll quickly become your loyal shadow and best friend. Once I trust you, I’m all about cuddles, kisses, and soaking up every bit of love I can get.

I dream of a forever home where I can feel safe, cherished, and part of the family. In return, I promise endless affection, laughter, and unconditional love.

Could you be the happily-ever-after my little heart has been waiting for? 🐾💕

name: Jina
description_html: Jina is sunshine in dog form. She is gentle, loving, dog-friendly, kennel trained, and potty trained. She enjoys slow walks, soft cuddles, and simply being near the people she loves. There’s something so special about her calm, sweet spirit. Jina has so much love to give and is patiently waiting for her forever home!

name: Charlotte
description_html:
Charlotte is a sweet, loving pup who gives her whole heart to the people she meets. It doesn’t take long for her to decide you’re her new best friend—she’s that kind of dog.

She’s incredibly social and does great with both humans and other dogs, making her an easy addition to many homes. Whether she’s meeting new friends or hanging out with her people, Charlotte is always happy to be part of the moment.

One of her favorite things? Car rides! She’s a calm and easy passenger who will happily curl up in the back seat and enjoy a peaceful nap while you drive.

Charlotte is also a big fan of treats and takes them ever so gently—just another sign of her sweet and easygoing nature.

If you’re looking for a loyal companion who’s affectionate, friendly, and ready to love you from day one, Charlotte might just be your perfect match. .

name: Bonnie
description_html: Want a playful, loving companion in your life? Look no further than Bonnie! She loves to cuddle with people and has shared her space peacefully with resident cats in her previous home. Take her on walks and she happily trots beside you to enjoy the scenery. Bonnie is extremely affectionate and will lounge with you throughout the day or evening. This girl has so much love to give, and she's ready to open her heart to a new home today!

name: Baby
description_html:
Baby is searching for the forever home she deserves. After her original owner could no longer care for her, she was adopted twice but returned both times due to changes in her adopters’ circumstances—not because of anything she did.


Baby was shy when she first arrived at the shelter, but she blossomed in our Cactus Cat program with the companionship of other gentle cats. She may need a little time to adjust in a new home, but once she feels comfortable, her sweet personality shines through.


Best of all, Baby is a lap cat! She loves being close to her people and will happily curl up for cuddles. Could you be the one to give Baby the loving, lasting home she’s been waiting for?

name: Annie
description_html:
Miss Annie presented to the shelter as a very sweet but scared lady who had been found on her own, at less than 40lbs, in very rough condition, and in need of an outstretched hand and polishing work.

She deserves to become her very best again, to have a wonderful life ahead waiting for her, that she was rudely interrupted from. See a short video of her shelter kennel life.

Annie's now in a foster home sharing daily life experiences with her humans including kids, dogs and cats. She's a sweet gem who is happy to fit in and be part of a family unit. Our wish for her, is to find her forever family, be it big or small, where she'll be cherished for all her time yet to come.


Her advocacy group Classic Canines has been supporting her wellness care while she's in foster.


Will you be the one to carry the rest of her story forward? Reach out on her link to connect with her foster and meet up.

Reach out to caring@classiccanines.org to learn more about how we can help with the transition or how to help in other ways.

name: Akira
description_html:
Akira is a loving 1 year old shepard who yearns to go on all the adventures with her humans.

Being a little over 1 years old - she’s still figuring out a lot but she is incredibly intelligent and intuitive. She would be best suited for an active household and a lot of enrichment!


She has been thriving each day out of the shelter. She’s walks nicely with her brand new easy walk harness. She loves sniffing every spot and checking up on all the different scents of the neighbourhood. She is respectful upon meeting new dogs and people.She loves both! When she met her foster siblings, she went belly up to show she meant no harm. Akira is also crate trained and is used to taking frequent crate breaks throughout the day!


She loves to play with her foster brother who has a similar play style as her but coexists well with her foster sister who doesn’t like to play as much. Girls girl. She is also very talented at disengaging with her siblings and taking breaks to re-regulate when she needs to. Her foster parents think she could be a single dog household but she definitely needs a lot of help and stimulation if that was the case. She has LOVED playing and engaging with her foster siblings which helps entertain her, we think!


Akira is a BIG cuddler & huge lover girl. She loves being baby spoon. If you’re sitting on the couch, she will hop up and want to be a lap dog she yearns to be. She’s a pro at the lean & smooch. She loves going belly up and getting all the belly scratches she can get until she evidently starts softly snoring.


Akira is a special girl and knows sit, settle, off, and lay down. She sits nicely as she’s being fed and loves ripping the stuffing out of all her toys. A backyard with a fence would also be best suited for her; she loves to go outside and watch all the critters that live in the woods behind her foster parents home. She is becoming an avid sunbather thanks to her foster sister showing her how nicely it feels!


To follow along and get more insight into Akira’s day to day at her foster house - check out @leaps.n.chomps_fosterhouse !! That’s her foster parents Instagram page where they are most active and responsive!

name: Mia
description_html:
Mia is a sweet, gentle big dog. She strolls along easily on leash and enjoys exploring the surroundings. She promptly sits for treats and gently takes them. Mia is friendly, affectionate and an enjoyable companion.


Come meet this beautiful young girl!

name: Elsa
description_html:
Meet Elsa!


Elsa is an absolute sweetheart who has had a rough time in life recently. She was being watched over and fed as a stray by a kind person who realized she may have gotten injured and had the shelter come to help.


Elsa is mostly recovered from being a possible hit by car pup but is looking for a soft place in a foster or adopter's home to let her hips fully recover! She is low energy, cuddly, sweet, and prefers short walks or a break in a yard. She is an absolute sweetheart and has won over the hearts of many volunteers and staff during her short time at the shelter.


Come meet Elsa today!

name: Ava
description_html:
She's the cutest, always ready to strike a pose.

Sweet Ava is calm, polite and a nice lady on a leash for walks.

She's at one with mother nature and simply watches the birds without intruding upon them.

We notice she isn't much into toys but if you get to her level she may be dishing out the kisses.

Ava is currently sharing a kennel with a mostly deaf and low vision fur friend and she's very respectful of that dog, just like she'll be with a nice, calm dog friend at home.

Come by and meet her and while you're here you can set up a meet for your dog too..

Short video here.

name: Tira
description_html:
Tira (short for Tiramisu) is currently nursing 8 kittens born in late March. She is available for adoption after she is no longer nursing and/or when her kittens are adopted (as well as other requirements as part of AAC policy such as spay/neuter and microchipped).


Tira is really sweet, gentle, and very sincere. She will feed her kittens immediately after taking a few bites of her wet food and will finish her food once she is done nursing.


Tira is only 9-months old and was a community cat before I brought her inside.

name: Gage
description_html:
Gage has a heart as big as his paws! ❤️

He is still figuring out the world, so he can come across a little shy and unsure. It doesn’t take him long to feel safe, and he will cuddle up as close as he can!

He is young, curious, and so eager to please everyone. His calm nature can easily fit in with any home environment. 

He earned great marks from a family who recently took him on a Doggy Day Out:

"We took Gage Out for a doggy day out this weekend and I just wanted to follow up and send over a quick write up if it will help him get adopted! 

Gage had a wonderful day out with our family and he is an absolute gem. He was a little shy at first, but once he settled in, his sweet personality truly shone through. This guy is a certified cuddle bug. He loves lounging in the yard, going for walks, and snuggling up with his people.

He was gentle and patient with our kids (ages 5 and 7), making him an ideal family dog. If you’re looking for a calm, loving companion with a big heart, Gage is your guy. He deserves the perfect forever home.

I wish we could take him in, but we already have two dogs and don’t have room for another at this time. But we will be back to take him out for more play dates!"

Stop by to meet Gage—you just might fall in love with his sweet and gentle personality.

name: Mera
description_html:
Mera is a wallflower at the shelter. She won't sing her own praises, but she's a lovely, endearing girl. Mera will lean into pets and loves affection. We would love to see her blossom in a home ASAP so that she doesn't have to hide her wonderful qualities anymore.


Mera 24816's foster says: "Mera is a very sweet but shy girl. She would really like to be the only pet in the home. She is not interested in meeting other animals. She loves to lay on top of you while you watch TV or scroll on your phone. And she likes to lay in the window and watch birds. She's just a very laid-back and chill cat, but might become more fun if she were in a home where she wasn't afraid of another animal getting in her space."

name: Ace
description_html:
When we say he's an "ace in the pocket", it's true.

If you are looking for a calm, collected, well keeled pet, Ace needs to be on your short list.

He's sharing his kennel with a dog friend nicely. He walks on a leash butter smooth, staying right by his person's knee, walking to their stride. He observes small critters in his vision lines, but does not take chase. He loves everyone equally, without feeling needy and overly affection seeking-he's happy to take your affections and affirmations, here and there. His coat is gorgeous. Let him practice his sit and down for you.

Ask staff or a volunteer to bring him out for you to meet.

name: Riven
description_html: Riven knows a friend when he meets one, and meeting friends is one of his favorite things to do! He loves attention and gentle affection. Riven is your couch buddy for TV time and your snuggle companion. He was easy going with new people he met in his previous home and enjoyed hanging out with dogs he was familiar with. Riven gets excited for playtime but also knows how to chill. He's the perfect balance of calm and fun! This special guy is ready to get to know you today!

name: Myna
description_html: Myna came into the shelter with her five little kittens and has done an amazing job raising them, now she’s ready to be the pampered center of attention. On May 21st her and her kittens are having their spay and neuter surgeries and will be ready for their new homes! She’s a dainty lady at only 6.5 pounds who chirps excitedly for wet food, but will also happily graze all day on dry food. She has not been impressed with the dog and resident cats in the foster home with her kittens around, but would likely get along with or be indifferent to other animals on her own.

name: Adélie (PetCo)
description_html:
Adélie is available for adoption at Petco Oak Hill!


Adélie is an easy going kitten that loves romping around with her sister, chasing toys, wrestling, and curling up for a nap. Because she thrives on feline companionship, she'll need a home with another young, playful cat—or, even better, be adopted with her sister Phoebe! Once she's gotten all of her zoomies out is when she is ready for cuddles and a lap to nap in. She'll need an indoor only home since she grew up in a foster home and lacks "street smarts."

name: Phoebe (PetCo)
description_html:
Phoebe is available for adoption at Petco Oak Hill!


Phoebe is a darling little kitten who is ready for her forever home. She loves chasing toys and wrestling her sister, Adélie. Phoebe has a bit of a drama queen streak and will let you know when dinner is late or not placed directly in front of her. Once, when a tape measure retracted too quickly for her liking she poofed up looking like a perfect Halloween decoration while every other kitten thought it was a great toy. She has a lot of kitten energy and would do best in a home with a young cat or another kitten, or even her sister Adélie! Phoebe has no experience outdoors and should be an indoor only cat for her safety.

name: Charlie
description_html:
Charlie is an excellent human and dog companion! He is handsome with an attentive, soulful gaze that will melt your heart instantly. Whether he is mingling with his four-legged friends in playgroup or strolling calmly through the neighborhood, Charlie is a dream on a leash and a true social butterfly. He could go home with a dog sibling after a meet & greet at the shelter.  

Charlie also shines when its time to cuddle and he lives for cozy moments and quiet companionship. If you are looking for a gentle soul to balance fun adventures with plenty of snuggles, Charlie is your guy!

name: Duke
description_html: Duke is an outdoorsman. He is your best buddy for hikes and walks through nature! This friendly, laid back guy has enjoyed the company of kids, cats and other dogs. He's very good natured, calm and easy to walk on leash. Duke also appreciates a good swim, so don't forget to take him to your favorite river or spring to splash around. He's ready for his next adventure today!

name: Tyson
description_html:
Here's one friendly good ole' boy with people, dogs and even outdoor cats..

He'll won't even destroy toys and balls left around by the kids or other dogs. His thing is exploring and he has plenty of spirit and pep for walks, hikes, and conducting recognizance in his yard space. See his short video here. He'll be keeping an ear up waiting for you to come by to meet him. Till then, much love.

name: Azuki
description_html:
Meet this sweet young boy looking for his forever home!

He is an incredibly friendly, calm, and loving dog who truly enjoys being around people. He gets along well with other dogs, is not aggressive at all, and is very non-reactive — he rarely barks and handles new environments, noises, rain, and other dogs with confidence and ease.

He already knows some commands, such as sit, stay, wait, go, and lay down, and he is very food motivated, which makes continued training easy and rewarding. He rides beautifully in the car, sits calmly during trips, and enjoys being by your side wherever you are.

While he does not enjoy being confined to a kennel, he absolutely loves relaxing on the couch or curling up on a comfy dog bed. He is affectionate without being overwhelming — he loves cuddles and belly rubs, stays close to his people, and has a calm, comforting presence. He’s the kind of companion who simply enjoys being near you.

Healthy, vaccinated, neutered, and ready to start his next chapter, he is looking for a loving home where he can finally settle in and be part of the family.

name: Kilo
description_html:
With a big smile and a heart to match, Kilo is ready to capture yours! This handsome, tan-and-white pup is the ultimate cuddle machine. If there’s an open spot next to you on the couch, expect Kilo to fill it instantly. He loves affection, especially belly rubs! 

He’s not just a professional snuggler, though—he’s got the brains to back up the beauty. Kilo is a certified smarty-pants who already knows sit, shake, and down. He loves to show off his tricks for treats! He is also great on a leash and generally pretty easygoing. Ready for a loyal, intelligent, extra-cuddly best friend? Kilo is your guy.

name: Hugo
description_html: Hugo is a friendly, playful guy who loves to go on long walks with his favorite people. He's an absolute cuddler, too! This smart boy knows basic commands like "sit" & "stay". Hugo's favorite activities are splashing in water and going for car rides. He appreciates a calmer home environment and may do best in a home without small children.

name: Cherry
description_html: Cherry & Truffle came in together and love each other very much so they must be adopted together! Cherry is very loyal and loving. She enjoys being close to her people without the need to be on top of them! Truffle will steal pets from you and soak up all your attention. They both love window watching. These girls are in need of some TLC today!

name: Truffle
description_html: Cherry & Truffle came in together and love each other very much so they must be adopted together! Cherry is very loyal and loving. She enjoys being close to her people without the need to be on top of them! Truffle will steal pets from you and soak up all your attention. They both love window watching. These girls are in need of some TLC today!

name: Chirp (Petco)
description_html:
Chirp is available for adoption at Petco Lakeline! Go there to meet her today.


Chirp loves to snuggle and get all the pets! Just as her name suggests, she will chirp out for your attention. She's mellow, affectionate, friendly and checks all the boxes. This girl is a volunteer and staff favorite and she's ready to get into a loving home today!

name: Gorgonzola
description_html:
Gorgonzola is a charming pup who is just as delightful as his name suggests! He has a bright, infectious smile and cute ears that suggest he’s always ready for an adventure. He has a unique colored coat (similar to his namesake cheese) and striking eyes, making this guy truly one of a kind.  

Gorgonzola is the ultimate companion; he is incredibly cuddly and truly loves to stay close to his favorite humans. Whether you are relaxing at home or heading out for a stroll, he is a dream on a leash. While he enjoys a slightly playful romp, his true specialty is providing unconditional love and endless snuggles. Meet this sweet boy today and see if you’re his forever.

name: Layna
description_html: Layna is an itty bitty pocket pitty mix. She is a sweet mama who loves to sit with you and get pets and kisses. She is chill and gets along with dogs.

name: Lana
description_html:
Meet Lana, a gentle soul who is looking for a soft place to land. She is a stunning girl with a sweet, soulful expression and beautiful, soft fur. While she can be a bit shy at first, Lana is a total dream on a leash, making her the perfect companion for quiet neighborhood strolls.

She is looking for a kind, patient foster or adopter who will give her the time and space she needs to truly blossom. Could you be the one to show Lana the love she deserves?

name: Mingus
description_html: Mingus ia a little love bug! He enjoys cuddling, purring, exploring, and playing with his brother and our large dog. He has recovered from an upper respiratory infection and is still getting a little medication for his left eye.

name: Phoenix
description_html: Phoenix is a very sweet boy. He purrs as soon as I come in the room. He enjoys playing with his brother and is working on his relationships with our large, too friendly dog.

name: Tessa
description_html: Tessa was found as a stray by some kind members of the community, but they could not keep her long term. In the home, she was very affectionate and eager to stay close to her people. Tessa was a peaceful presence, completely housetrained, furniture friendly and ready to lounge with her friends and get lots of snuggles. She has shown curiosity toward dogs and calm children with slow introductions. Tessa is a playful girl and hasn't met a squeaky toy she didn't like. Ask staff to meet this girl today and prepare to fall in love!

name: White Cheddar Cheezit
description_html:
