White Cheddar Cheezit, or Cheesy for short, demonstrated his loving deameanor and won everyone over during his foster stay. A self-proclaimed 50lb lap dog who loves cuddles and pets, he would occasionally try to climb onto your lap to soak up your affection.


At only 11 months of age, Cheesy is surprisingly calm; he is fantastic at entertaining himself with a rotation of toys and puzzles, and a frozen Kong with peanut butter and kibbles will keep him busy for 15 minutes. He especially loves squeaky toys and will carry them around to show off. Cheesy also LOVES playing fetch with bouncy balls or squeaky toys, and will pass out within 15 minutes of it. When playtime is over, Cheesy settles beautifully and loves napping by your side. He loves his people and is a little bit of a velcro dog!


Cheesy would thrive in a home with a yard, but he has demonstrated superb apartment-living skills in his foster's 4th-floor studio apartment. Apartment dwellers may find it helpful to take him for longer walks/runs and play sessions to burn off his puppy energy. Cheesy is happy to join you on any adventures!


Cheesy is a highly adaptive puppy. He takes the elevator easily and is getting very good at sitting and staying until you say "free," focusing on you even with other people in the elevator! He is also comfortable in a car, jumping straight into his designated seat the moment the door opens.


Cheesy's high food motivation and eagerness to please make him easy to train. He already knows sit and down, and is easily directed into the crate with some food. He is also perfecting his 'stay', 'leave it', 'drop it', and 'come here'. Cheesy sleeps in his crate overnight and will occasionally go in to nap. Cheesy also likes being brushed and will roll over for belly rubs whenever you walk by.


Other than being the bestest boy on Earth, Cheesy is also potty- and leash-trained. He has not had a single accident since joining his foster's apartment. He is also known for being amazing on the leash, rarely pulling, and easily directed with a call or a tug. He has not reacted to kids, bikes, people, big dogs, or small dogs. He has beautiful social skills and is eager to play with friendly dogs. He may get carried away staring at a squirrel or a lizard, but a gentle but firm tug and some positive reinforcement will get him to move on, as with anything else he is fixated on.


If you have a feeling Cheesy might be the one, please reach out for a meet-and-greet! He will be so excited to see you.

name: Betty Boop
description_html: Betty Boop AKA The Boopers is a 30 lb, special little creature. This adorable lady is extremely agile and can jump very high without any running momentum. She walks very well on a leash and is 100% potty trained. She does not like a crate and will not tear or chew anything if left home alone. She is super food motivated and likes her enrichment mat or a good raw bone to keep her entertained for a good amount of time. She likes chasing squirrels in the backyard. She loves belly rubs and rubbing her back in the grass or rug. She is getting more integrated with dogs whom she was pretty scared of at first. She is fine around my two dogs and has been in close encounters with cats with zero interest in her part. With either it will take a minute and thoughtful integration and then she should be fine. We love The Boopers who was found just wandering the streets but we already have two dogs so we want someone who can just love this lady with all their heart!

name: Basil
description_html: Playful Feta and laidback Basil are a bonded pair of sisters who can’t stand to be out of eyesight of eachother. They love to cuddle and play, they are still very young and getting comfortable with humans. With a comfy environment they will come out of their shell!

name: Feta
description_html: Playful Feta and laidback Basil are a bonded pair of sisters who can’t stand to be out of eyesight of eachother. They love to cuddle and play, they are still very young and getting comfortable with humans. With a comfy environment they will come out of their shell!

name: Lefty
description_html:
If you've ever wanted your very own miniature panther, Lefty may be the cat for you. This handsome senior gentleman has striking good looks, a sweet personality, and all the charm that comes with age and experience.

Lefty is a total sweetheart who knows exactly what matters in life: a cozy cat bed, a comfortable place to relax, and people to love. He has perfect litter box manners and the calm, easygoing nature that makes senior cats such wonderful companions.

Sadly, during busy kitten season, amazing cats like Lefty are often overlooked as adopters gravitate toward younger cats. But what many people don't realize is that senior cats have so much to offer. Lefty is past the rambunctious stage and ready to settle into a home where he can spend his days lounging, loving, and being loved.

This distinguished gentleman deserves more than a shelter kennel. Come meet Lefty and discover why senior cats make some of the very best companions.

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Lefty and ALL Desperate Housecats!

name: Esperanza
description_html:
Meet Esperanza! She was initially shy in the shelter, but she's come out of her shell with the help of her feline friends. She loves the company of other cats, and she now enjoys greeting new people each day and getting lots of pets.

Esperanza is easy going and affectionate, and ready to add a little joy to each day with a lucky family.

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Esperanza and ALL Desperate Housecats/Cactus Cats!

name: Murphy
description_html:
This sweet mellow fellow would love to find the comforts of home. Come by and get to know him and see what we see - a nice dog that's learning how to make sense of this temporary fork in the road. He's met some dog friends that he's kenneled with, and did well, especially a pup that looked like his younger self.

He's eligible for foster and adoption and fostering requires as little as two weeks commitment, longer if you time permits. It helps us collect home notes to further his placement options. If you fall in love, then you know you'll have a keeper. Don't wait another day while a shelter dog is struggling, waiting for the kindness of a hand up and out.

name: Roy
description_html:
Roy is a very sweet, very playful, purrboy, who loves attention as much as he loves to play. He loves to play with his 4 sibs, with ~medium-ish energy, maybe a little more as he grows. Use the email below to reach out to his foster directly for more information or to set up a meet/greet.

 

- Email: adaywithfosters@gmail.com

- Pictures & Info: https://www.instagram.com/adaywithfosters

 

More details from his foster on him, coming in a couple of days.

name: Doc
description_html:
Doc (Purple Collar) Is a very sweet, instapurr, playful boy, who often wants to play first and purr second but will also come running when you put your hand down and call him. He loves to play with his 4 sibs, with ~medium-ish energy, maybe a little more as he grows. Use the email below to reach out to his foster directly for more information or to set up a meet/greet.

 

- Email: adaywithfosters@gmail.com

- Pictures & Info: https://www.instagram.com/adaywithfosters

 

More details from his foster on him coming in a couple of days.

name: Jesse
description_html:
Jesse (Yellow Collar) is a playful, purr monster and loves to be loved. He’s very playful, who zooms and plays with his 4 sibs, with ~medium-ish energy, maybe a little more as he grows. Use the email below to reach out to his foster directly for more information or to set up a meet/greet.

 

- Email: adaywithfosters@gmail.com

- Pictures & Info: https://www.instagram.com/adaywithfosters

 

More pictures and details on him from his foster in a couple of days.

name: Butch
description_html:
Butch (Grey Collar) is a bouncy boy, purr monster and loves attention. He’s very playful and romps with his 4 sibs, with ~medium-ish energy, maybe a little more as he grows. Use the email below to reach out to his foster directly for more information or to set up a meet/greet.

 

- Email: adaywithfosters@gmail.com

- Pictures & Info: https://www.instagram.com/adaywithfosters

 

More pictures & details on him from his foster in a couple of days.

name: Naomi
description_html: Naomi is a very sweet cat who loves to CUDDLE. She loves pets and scratches under her chin and will even roll over to ask for belly scratches. It took her 2 days to really come out of her shell and now she loves to just hang out while you eat, get ready, or watch tv. If you’re looking for a sweet cat Naomi is perfect for you. She just wants to be with you at all times and sit in your lap.

name: Lyric
description_html:
Pretty Lyric is a sweet young dog who strolls along easily on leash and appears housetrained. She is friendly, affectionate, mellow and a wonderful companion. Lyric does keep an eye out for pesky squirrels on her walks. 🐿️


Come meet this special girl!

name: Kangaskhan
description_html: Kangaskhan is a good natured, affectionate lady who had to be surrendered due to housing restrictions. She is crate trained and walks very well on leash! She knows several commands in Spanish: sit, stay, down, come and paw. Besides snuggles with people, she also loves squeaky toys and chew bones. This laid back lady is ready to be your special new family member today!

name: Toast
description_html:
Hi, I'm Toast! I was too young to get adopted when I arrived at the shelter, but I'm excited to say that now I'm old enough, and I can't wait to meet my new forever family!

In my foster house, I've enjoyed playing with my sister and a dog a little bit older than I am. The two resident teenagers are a little loud, but I don't care. I get so excited when they are around! My foster mom has been working with me on my home skills - crate training, using the bathroom outside, and sitting for treats. I'm pretty good at these, but keep in mind I'm very young still and will need more practice!

If you think I might be the perfect addition to your family, fill out an application and my foster mom will get in touch with you!

name: Stormie Rain
description_html:
Her name says it all - she's the best rainy day, cozy up, cuddle up with the blankies companion - she's long on comforts, and has a very relaxed viewpoint of life that makes having her around a breeze.


Come meet Stormie Rain in person between 11-7pm at her kennel. She's looking forward to the best of the rest of her life ahead of her.

Have a dog family member? Set up a meet and greet at the shelter.

See you soon?

name: Sage
description_html: Sage came in with several other cats from a difficult situation. They are all still learning to trust us, but we don't think it will take long for them to relax, especially once they are in a loving home! These kitties may need a patient adopter to help them through the transition. They can be adopted in pairs or may enjoy a feline friend in their new home.

name: Marmalade
description_html: Marmalade came in with several other cats from a difficult situation. They are all still learning to trust us, but we don't think it will take long for them to relax, especially once they are in a loving home! These kitties may need a patient adopter to help them through the transition. They can be adopted in pairs or may enjoy a feline friend in their new home.

name: Tangerine Dream
description_html: Tangerine Dream came in with several other cats from a difficult situation. They are all still learning to trust us, but we don't think it will take long for them to relax, especially once they are in a loving home! These kitties may need a patient adopter to help them through the transition. They can be adopted in pairs or may enjoy a feline friend in their new home.

name: Endora
description_html: Endora is playful and likes to talk. She is a brown tabby with small orange patches.

name: Bonus
description_html: Sweet and loves to talk. Inquisitive and fun! Loves to play

name: Mufasa
description_html:
SO Majestic! After living with one owner his entire life, Mufasa has found himself at AAS because of allergies in the family. He has been described as the ‘best cat ever’; a very sweet love bug. He loves to be held, and will purr the entire time.

Mufasa allows nail trims, enjoys being brushed, and is easy to put in a carrier. He is a cuddly lap cat, and is friendly and social. Because he is older, we would love to see him out of the shelter, either through adoption or foster. He has lived with other cats and young children, but he also might really enjoy being the only one getting all the attention.

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Mufasa and ALL Desperate Housecats!

name: Ducky
description_html:
Meet Ducky! He's 16 lbs of pure joy, curiosity and spunk. At 4.5 years old, we don't know much about his backstory but we do know that he's resilient.


Ducky came to us after wandering to a strangers house with a severe and infected neck wound. We don't know how or why this happened, but we knew right away that this brave boy was something special.


He's currently living in foster, where he spends his days playing in the backyard, taking long walks through the neighborhood and watching Bravo on the couch with his foster mom. He lives well with his foster brother, and would love to have a doggy sibling of his own one day! His favorite day would be filled with lots of sniffing, playing with puzzles and snuggles with his person.


He's housetrained, crate trained and non-destructive. He already knows sit and now that he has a little structure and routine, he's quickly picking up on more skills! We don't know how long Ducky was injured and alone on the streets, so he can be sensitive at times (understandably so) and would do best with a family that is patient and will respects his boundaries. He can get a little spooked by larger dogs when passing them on walks, so a home with a yard would be the best fit for him. With a little patience and love, Ducky will open up to you and show you his soft, affectionate side.


Interested in adopting Ducky? Fill out an application today!

name: Bruce
description_html:
Bruce shows us how much he loves and adores the people who care for him. He's very gentle. He asks only that you be sensitive with his heart and he'll reward you many times over.


He's smooth as silk on a leash.

He's crate trained, ideal for transitions and traveling to other's homes

Bruce will be neutered for adoption or while in foster care.

Are you ready to show a sweet dog all that life is supposed to be?

He's waiting to meet you..

name: Poppi
description_html:
Poppi is a soft, delicate little lady who will capture your heart.

She loves having a confident dog friend near and will thrive best in a home with a friendly dog who appreciates a little friend like her.

The hair at Poppi's back end is still regrowing in from her former sad life conditions. She's on standard skin medications through the end of May. Her condition is expected to fully recover, it just takes a little time for hair to regrow. If Poppi is your heart dog, don't delay due to a temporary condition that's already on the mend. She needs you, and your dog friend at home.

name: Mango (Petco)
description_html:
Mango is available for adoption at Petco Lakeline! Head over there to meet him today.


Mango is a social butterfly! He loves people and is very appreciative of attention and affection. He's also very laid back and may do well in a home with other cats as friends. This boy is purrfect and all he's missing is a home!

name: Sir Floofsalot
description_html: Sir Floofsalot came into the shelter when their owner passed away. He’s shy in the kennel but will give a little tiny meow and squint his eyes at us to say, “please pet me”. He leans into pets and seems to get comfort by them. We think he has so much more to share but he’s too scared to tell us in the shelter. We’d love to learn more about him in a foster home if this handsome boy doesn't get adopted soon!

name: Nanette
description_html: Nanette is a major lover girl! This sweetie will give you all of the kisses. She loves to play with toys and go on walks as well. She is a bundle of energy ready to jump into your lap and smother you with love!

name: Patches
description_html: Patches is a kind, loving 12.5 year old Chihuahua who loves to go on short walks around the neighborhood, be close to his human, perfectly house-trained, loves kids, cats and dogs (once he meets them). He is content to lay around, go on car rides, or out and about with whatever your up to that day. He has come with me to dinners on the patio, out at Bouldin Acres and school pick-ups for the kids.

name: Adalida
description_html: Sweet Adalida is a beautiful young dog. She is dog friendly, appears housetrained and is easy on leash. She’s very treat motivated and loves fetch. Adalida is trusting and adventurous and is ready to be welcomed into a loving family. Come meet this special girl!

name: Cayenne
description_html: Cayenne is a spicy little pepper, just like her name suggests. She's lived outdoors and may make an excellent mouser or hunter, protecting your property from unwanted guests. Cayenne may enjoy having cat friends to keep her company. She's known the kindness and compassion of a caregiver in her past, and that's what she deserves for her future. We have added her to our Cactus Cat program so she can get extra attention from volunteers and have the safety net of fellow cactus feline friends. Cayenne may do well as a "working cat" or just a cat to support your housecats or join your growing cat family.

name: Mo Mo
description_html:
Mo Mo is honestly the total package- she's sweet, chill, and incredibly adaptable. From day one, she has just fit right in and rolled with the punches. She absolutely adores every human and dog she meets, and her main goal in life is really just to be your absolute best friend.


She’s already crate-trained and is such a quick learner; when treats are involved, she focuses right up, which makes working on training a breeze. On walks, she hits that perfect sweet spot where she's excited to see the world and doesn't pull. Mo Mo loves a good play session with her dog buds to burn off some energy, but she has a great off-switch. As soon as playtime is over, her absolute favorite place to be is crashed out on the couch right next to you! She is just an all-around amazing, low-drama companion who is going to make some lucky family so, so happy.

name: Muffy
description_html:
Muffy is a cutie with a squeaky meow more like a little mouse! She's cute, even if she prefers us to keep our distance at first. She came in with several other cats from an outdoor community where the caregiver passed away.

Muffy seems to get along well with other cats so we've added her to our Cactus Cat program where she can get comfort from cat friends and some confidence building training from volunteers. She's very shy and will likely need a patient, cat savvy adopter to help her through a transition to a home.

Ask about Muffy if you think you can be her special someone!

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Muffy and ALL Desperate Housecats/Cactus Cats!

name: Logic
description_html:
Logic loves to meet new people here. He's pretty sure one of them will take him on an outing or take him home and we're cheering him on. He has all the home skills you expect of a guy who has a little wisdom behind him, yet still has plenty of energy for activities and fun.

Fun fact: he lived well with a senior mini poodle

Here's what to know about his home credentials:

--stays home alone well, housetrained of course!

--knows all of his cues - sit, down, stay and paw

Come meet Logic and set up a doggie meet for your resident dog if you have one.

We all hope to see you soon!

See his intro video here

name: Finley
description_html:
Meet Finley! 🐾 (Or as we like to call him: our “TEMU Shiba Inu” 🐕) Finley is an approximately 1-year-old medium/large mixed breed dog with a sweet personality and so much love to give. After being found as a stray and likely dumped by his previous owners, he’s been working hard learning what it means to feel safe, cared for, and part of a home. 🏡


In his time with us, Finley has made incredible progress:

• Potty-trained and house-broken

• Walks well on a leash, knows “sit,” and is learning additional commands

• Does well when left alone: is non-destructive and minimal barking

• Crate-trained

• Dog friendly and would likely do well with children (unsure about cats)

• Fully vaccinated, microchipped, and neutered


Finley has overcome a lot already, and now he’s ready for a forever home where he can continue to thrive. He’s goofy, loving, eager to learn, and truly deserves a family of his own! 🧡

name: Sophie
description_html:
Gorgeous Sophie arrived at the shelter with nine other cats after being surrendered by her family. The group was given a wonderful room with big windows where they could spend their days watching squirrels, birds, and all the little happenings outside.


One by one, Sophie's siblings found loving homes. But somehow, Sophie was left behind.

Now that the room is needed for another group of surrendered cats, Sophie has lost her window seat and finds herself alone in a kennel. We wish we knew why she keeps getting overlooked. She's beautiful, friendly, and ready to be someone's beloved companion.


Every day, Sophie watches other cats leave for their new lives while she waits for her turn.

Could you be the person who changes Sophie's story?

name: Babyboy Da Prince
description_html:
Look at that happy smile! Prince is a striking, chocolate-brown gentleman with the most expressive amber eyes. True to his name, he is absolute royalty when it comes to spreading joy.

Prince perfectly balances an active, playful spirit with a deeply affectionate side. He is always down for a fun game or an outdoor adventure, but his absolute favorite royal decree is the "lean-in." The moment you stop moving, he’ll press his warm, solid self right against your legs, practically begging for cuddles. Ready to welcome this sweet, smiling boy into your home?

name: Molly
description_html: Molly is a sweet, smiley dog who was found roaming near Research Blvd. She adapted to the foster home very quickly and is house trained! She loves belly rubs and is always excited to meet new people. Molly would be an amazing family dog. She loves outside and would be very happy with a yard to play in!

name: Zelda
description_html: Zelda is sweet and energetic. She loves to play and loves to cuddle . She has a great temperament. She is not afraid of our other cats and tries to make friends with them. She is good with both kids and adults .

name: Precious
description_html:
Meet Precious — and yes, her name fits her perfectly.


Precious is a 3-year-old sweetheart who is learning that life can be soft, safe, and full of love. Her previous owner made the heartbreaking decision to surrender her due to financial hardship, and before coming to the shelter, Precious spent much of her time the last 3 months living in a backyard. Because of that, new people and environments can feel a little overwhelming at first.


Give her a little patience, though, and you’ll quickly see her true personality shine through. Once Precious feels comfortable, she transforms into an affectionate cuddle bug who will happily curl up in your lap and soak up every bit of love you offer.


She’s a low-energy girl who seems content with the simple things — a comfy bed, a calm home, gentle companionship, and someone she can trust. She also appears to be house trained, making her an easy companion for a lucky adopter.


Precious is looking for a family that understands that some dogs just need a little extra time to bloom. In return, she’ll give you quiet loyalty, sweet cuddles, and a bond that feels truly special.

If you’re searching for a gentle soul to love, Precious may be the perfect addition to your home.

name: Hazel
description_html:
Hi everyone! I'm Hazel. My people had a misfortune and I was alone so I was brought to this new place. The people here are very nice to me, they treat me like a rockstar, making me feel really special with the prettiest collar and nice bedding for my woman's size frame. I love to meet people and 'specially like to leave my little den and go for short walks and lounge in the pool. I can't always hear the people and tones around me but I can see really really well and people tell me I have the prettiest eyes, hazel of course. My friends here said I'm on track to graduate from the senior class but I must find a suitable life mission--I said "I know, I'm trying really hard". So will you please consider me for an indoors job? I'm spayed, heart worm negative and ready to leave as fast as your vehicle travels. Hope to see you soon - with much love, Hazel.

See my short IG video here.

name: Hobbes
description_html:
Hi there, do you like my Elvis impression? I have lots of toothy grins waiting for you. I'm new 'round here and took the place like a storm! Just like I do in my foster home too!


My foster mommy says I'm the most wonderful, respectful little gentleman. I love spending time relaxing in my little bed and lounging on the couch, but I also like going on walks and exploring outside. I'm a big fan of treats and I'm always excited when snack time comes around!

While I might be little, I have a huge personality and an even bigger heart. I have been incredibly sweet, gentle, and easygoing, and a joy to have in her home. She said anyone looking for a loyal companion and cuddle buddy would be lucky to have ME in their life.


Some people tell me they're afraid to come to the shelter because it's like a Heartbreak Hotel. Lucky you, Since I'm staying in a foster home meeting me is super easy. Just use my link and my peeps will get back to you. If you have any technical troubles you can reach out to my friends at caring@classiccanines.org

Hope to hear from ya soon, I'll be waiting. Love, Hobbes.

Check out my introduction video.

name: Sunny
description_html:
This beautiful flame-point Siamese mix was found alone at a gas station, dirty and exhausted, but still unbelievably sweet and trusting. Even after whatever he’s been through, all he wants is love, soft blankets, and someone to make muffins for.

And yes, he is a professional biscuit maker. The second he gets comfortable, the paws start kneading nonstop. Beds, blankets, laps… everything becomes part of his bakery.


He’s estimated to be around 5 years old and has already charmed everyone he meets with his calm, affectionate personality and stunning blue eyes. He handled vet visits, medications, and care like an absolute gentleman and seems happiest simply being close to people.


Despite a rough start, he has such a soft and loving soul. He’s the kind of cat that quietly follows you around, curls up nearby, and looks at you like he’s just grateful to finally be safe.


If you’re looking for a gentle companion that melts your heart, the Muffin Man is ready for his forever home.

name: Phil
description_html: Cuddly, inquisitive Phil will be a wonderful addition to any home. He's in foster due to an eye infection that is clearing up nicely. Phil is quite, eating well, seems to like our small dogs (doesn't hiss at them when we're on the couch together but no close intros yet) and enjoys playing with toys. Phil is tiny at under 2 lbs.

name: Bucee
description_html:
Bucee needs a little help that works better in the comfort a home. He is being treated for a doggie cold with oral meds right now. The vet staff have also heard a heart murmur. We would like to get him into the comfort of a cool home to rest and recover and then we'll recheck all his vital systems and identify if he has any other needs. It's very warm in the area where he's staying right now and stretching out on the cement in the hot sun can affect his recovery.

Bucee is already neutered and heart worm negative. His hair is silky soft, indicating he's had a good diet.


Bucee is a very happy and friendly, easy going guy. He has thoroughly impressed everyone he meets. Bucee is not your typical cattle dog. He doesn't seem to get into toys and balls much and simply likes to explore and be with people. We've seen none of the sweetly obnoxious behaviors that cattle dogs possess. He's a well keeled dog and walks nice on a leash and has only shown friendly behavior toward dogs near him.


In a home he should be separated from other pets while recovering from his URI a few more days. Then he and the home pets can be brought together.


If you can make a cool landing spot for him, please come in to discuss, or email animal.foster@austin.texas.gov and caring@classiccanines.org to get things started.

name: Dawdle
description_html: My name is Dawdle. As a distinguished elder gentleman I never thought I would land in a shelter. I'm so glad a nice lady picked me to go to foster for 10 days so I can recover from a doggie cold. Then I have to move on fast so I don't go back to the shelter. If you would so kindly welcome me to a quiet spot in your home where I can set up my bed and a few bedside essentials, and share house privileges, I would be ever so grateful to you. I love people a whole lot, I'll love you too! I'm very house trained and I walk nicely on a leash. I'm a very good boy my foster mom tells me. I hope you can understand all I've been through so we can share a vision together of a fantastic friendship where I help you and you help me. I can't wait to meet you. Reach out on my link or write my advocates at caring@classiccanines.org because I need a place to go to by June 11th!

name: Missy
description_html:
Missy is a total ball of cute! She loves people, loves to cuddle, loves to play, and will lean in to your hand with any petting. We love to hear her purr when we caress her head - it is so CUTE. How did she produce so much purr? She loves to play with her sisters from the same litter. They all love to play with stuffed mice, string and ribbon - and romp.


She would love you to love her! She'd love to show you her purr!

name: Layla
description_html:
Layla loves romping with her twin sister (pet ID 25566). You will find her resting on the arm of a couch most days - we call her the side-car. Sit on the couch and she'll be there.


When we lift her to our chests she will purr and purr. She loves ribbon and string!

name: Lupe Fiasco
description_html:
Lupe is a 5-year-old sweetheart with a gentle soul and a heart full of love. This handsome boy already knows "sit" and "shake," and he's happy to show off his excellent manners for treats and praise. He absolutely loves people and is happiest when he's snuggled up beside you, soaking up affection and handing out plenty of kisses in return.


Despite being a big dog, Lupe is wonderfully easy to walk on a leash and enjoys getting out for strolls with his favorite humans. He's the kind of companion who is content to be by your side, whether you're relaxing at home, taking a walk around the neighborhood, or settling in for a cozy evening on the couch.


Lupe has the easygoing personality to thrive in either a house or an apartment, as long as he has people to love and a comfortable place to call his own.


If you're looking for a loyal, affectionate best friend who will greet you with kisses and stay close for snuggles, Lupe may be the perfect match for you.

name: Clover
description_html:
Howdy! My name is Clover and I am a calico tabby. I am currently 10 weeks old and am full of energy! I am adventurous, confident and love to play with my foster people. I love to play with my interactive bird toys and take a nice nap after play time! I love to watch and listen to movies, my favorites are The Bee Movie and The Secret Life of Pets. I will likely get along with another playful kitty but have not met any dogs yet. I would love to be adopted and find my forever family that will play and cuddle with me!


Clover is currently pending meet and greet with a potential adopter

name: Belle
description_html:
Meet Belle.


Belle came to the shelter after the heartbreaking loss of her owner. We don't know much about her past, but we do know that she handled the transition to the shelter with remarkable grace. During intake, Belle was calm and well-behaved despite having her whole world turned upside down.


The shelter environment has been much harder on her. Belle is frightened and spends most of her time hiding, often tucking herself behind her bed where she feels safest. It's easy to overlook a scared cat in a kennel, but Belle isn't showing who she truly is right now—she's simply trying to cope with losing the home and person she loved.


What Belle needs most is a patient, caring adopter who can give her the time and security to feel safe again. Once she's back in a quiet home, we believe she'll have the chance to rediscover comfort, trust, and happiness.


Belle has already lost so much. Now she needs someone willing to give her a second chance. Could that someone be you?

name: Dakota
description_html:
Dakota is a lady dog that arrived with a small fur gent named Montana. Shelter life was scary for him and he had some special needs and went to a foster home. Sadly he passed on, leaving Dakota to pass a baton for the both of them. She's still waiting in a shelter kennel, for her big home break. She'll carry the baton pass for her, and her little brother.


Dakota is a tender lady who needs a little compassion, a little patience for warming up, and a tender touch. It won't take long and you will get the reward of her smiles and friendship. She doesn't like staying outside in the heat, she's the kind of lady who does her business and wants to come right back in. So if that fits your lifestyle too, you'll hit it off well. As an older lady she likes having the freedom of extra potty breaks please and thank you.


Hope to see you soon!

name: Skippy
description_html:
This quirky little girl is always up for an adventure, whether she’s chasing toys, exploring every corner of the house, or finding creative new ways to entertain herself—and everyone around her.

One of her sweetest traits is how much she loves her people. The moment you walk into the room, her purr starts up like clockwork. She’s happiest when she can be part of the action, following along to see what you’re doing and making sure she gets her fair share of attention. She's very brave and instantly made herself at home. She isn't afraid of dogs or other cats and barely bats an eye.

Skippy is full of charm and curiosity, with a playful spirit that keeps life fun. She’s the kind of kitten who will make you laugh with her silly antics, then melt into a puddle of purrs when you stop to give her some love. We named her Skippy after our favorite children's books about a spunky cat exploring the world. Skippy is super connected to her sister and often shows her little sister the ropes. We would love it if they could find a home together! Skippy will steal your hearts, like she's stolen ours.

name: Lulu
description_html: Lulu is a super snuggly little girl. If you are looking for a tiny best friend with a huge heart, this little kitty is for you. She loves her sister, so it would be a plus if you're looking for two little companions! This super sweet and cuddly kitten loves being close to people and is happiest when curled up in a warm lap or snuggled beside you for a nap. She has been with us for a month and loves to sleep by her people. She has been around dogs and other cats, so she should be able to acclimate to any new environment. Lulu has a gentle, affectionate personality and never misses an opportunity to follow around her humans, purr up a storm, or snuggle up on the couch. While playful and curious like any kitten, this little one’s favorite activity is soaking up love and attention.

name: Panda Bear
description_html:
At 14 years old, Panda Bear recently lost the only home she has ever known when her owner could no longer care for her. After a lifetime of comfort and routine, finding herself in a shelter has been confusing and overwhelming for this sweet senior girl.


Panda Bear spends much of her time tucked safely in her bed, quietly watching the world around her. But beneath her timid shelter demeanor is a cat who has been a beloved companion for many years. She has lived peacefully with other adult cats, has impeccable litter box manners, and enjoys one of life's simple pleasures: sitting by a window and watching the world go by.


The shelter is no place for a cat who has spent 14 years in a home. Whether through adoption or fostering, you could give Panda Bear the security, love, and peace she deserves.

Could you be the one to help Panda Bear feel at home again?

name: Cooper
description_html:
Cooper came to the shelter through no fault of his own when his owner moved out of state and was unable to take him along. Now this sweet boy is looking for a new family to call his own.


While Cooper may be shy when meeting new people, don't let that fool you—once he gets to know you, he becomes a devoted and loving companion. In fact, Cooper is a true lap cat who enjoys spending quality time with his favorite people. He loves treats, appreciates a good conversation, and is happiest when he's relaxing near someone he trusts.


Cooper has previously lived with other cats and knows how to share his home with feline friends. What he needs now is a patient adopter who will give him a little time to settle in and let his wonderful personality shine.


If you're looking for a loyal companion who will reward your patience with endless love and companionship, Cooper may be the perfect cat for you.

name: Paquito
description_html:
Meet Paquito - aka Paqui (pah-key)! Paqui is a beautiful, big Great Dane girlie who looks even more beautiful in real life. Though her foster parents haven’t had her long, they love how sweet, silly, and cuddly she is so far.


Paqui loves toys! She’s gone through her toy bin and has picked up everything, running around the house squeaking them in her mouth. She will throw them up in the air then lunge onto the couch (though she’s so tall it doesn’t look like hard work at all). Paqui does not enjoy sharing toys with dogs though, so if she’s playing make sure the toys are for her only or that she’s separated!


Paqui has some young dog energy and will occasionally get "slow zoomies". Because she's such a giant, her zoomies arein slow motion compared to a smaller dog, but she sure looks cute with her version of zoomies! She loves to make sure all her toys are still around after she's had the zooms, then proceeds to pass out on the couch once she's checked in with them all.


While Paqui was in a room with a medium male dog at the shelter, she would do wonderfully without a friend too. She loves attention and as long as she gets a lot of love from you, she’d be set in an only-human home. She may prefer to play and eat independently, at least initially while she decompresses and learns to trust any dog siblings! If you do have another dog, her foster mom will set up a time to have a meet-and-greet for them both at the shelter to make sure it's a fit and that everyone gets along well!


Paqui would be a wonderful companion for someone who has had experience with large dogs or someone who understands that there will be a LOOOOT of drool (it’s her love language). Because she’s big, she would love to have some space and a yard, but it's not a dealbreaker if you’re down to give her a lot of walks and play time so she can stretch her long legs! Please reach out if you want to meet her and get ready to fall in love with the sweetest giant!

name: Opal
description_html:
Hi, I'm Opal!

I need a helping hand and a place to stay so I can get a fresh start.

Don't let anyone tell you my age is a barrier - I'm here to prove my spirit and will, even though my eyes and ears don't work all that well anymore, I still have a lot of life left to give. I'm a joyful lady. I would like to stay with someone who's joyful like me.

See my short introduction video here

I have people standing by ready to help connect resources for me, isn't that great? Do you want to be my friend and let me stay with you? Reach out onsite to the staff or offsite to caring@classiccanines.org

name: Penny
description_html:
Penny is a boss lady who knows what she wants! And she wants out of this kennel. She also wants to be your only special feline and get all your attention. Penny is a happy girl when she has her special someone to follow around. She loves to watch you cook and go about your daily tasks (aka make sure you're doing it right). This smart girl knows her name and responds to little "kissy" sounds.


Penny is unimpressed with our service here at the shelter, so she may not show you her best side in a kennel. We'd love to see her in a foster home if she doesn't get adopted ASAP!

name: Chex
description_html: Chex is sweet and independent! This very playful boy is shy at first, but with a little patience he opens up and likes to cuddle with his person. He loves to eat and will guard his portion of the meal to make sure he gets his share. This kitten will require a constant companion in his new home - ideally another playful kitten, but an older kitty or person who is home most of the time could also work! Experienced with adults, kids and kittens, and is litter box trained.

name: Pringle
description_html: This fluffy fellow enjoys interacting with people and getting pets, and is easy-going. He loves head pets and massages and alllll the soft food. This kitten will require a constant companion in his new home, ideally another playful kitten and a person who is home a lot. Experienced with adults, kids and kittens, and is litter box trained.
Super playful, and gregarious. Hungry and healthy. Ready to adopt after vax and neutering on 2026-06-22
Sweet girl, incredibly gregarious, hungry and healthy.

name: Bug
description_html: Bug is a big softie. He is a great energy and lovable vibe. He is smart and already knows sit, lay down, shake, and roll over. He looks at you with those soulful eyes. He loves pets and scratches and kisses. While he is a big boy, for sure, he would make either a perfect big or little spoon as you snuggle.

name: Chickpea
description_html:
Chickpea is very eager for human attention. He LOVES to chase a shoestring and wrestle his brother. He is quite a talker when he wants attention, mewing as he toddles towards me. He is quick to purr.


He is very curious and outgoing. He scouts the area and then his brother Garbanzo joins him. He likes scritches and being held against my chest with one hand while I pet him with the other hand. He loves being held upside down while I rub his ears. When I walk away, he calls for me to come back. He would follow me around the house if he could.


Let me know if you'd like to visit him!

name: Shadow
description_html:
Shadow was brought to AAS as a stray, but we know that he belonged to someone because he is very friendly, cuddly, and mellow. He’s a lap cat and doesn’t mind being picked up and held.

Shadow seeks attention, and will purr while you pet him. He is very laid back, and may be fine with other cats. He’s doing well in the shelter, but because he is older, we would love to see out of this environment through either adoption or foster.

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Shadow and ALL Desperate Housecats!

name: Princesa
description_html:
Meet Princesa ~ life tossed her a curve ball when she lost her longtime home due to her owner's hardship, marking the start of a major transition in life.

Princesa can be shy in this new place, but also sweetly confident in her own. She's affectionate, house trained, crate trained and walks nicely on a leash and loves taking walks. She has lived with a male dog about the same size as her for part of her life and is now sharing her kennel with another dog here at the shelter. See them together in their kennel here

She's spayed, vaccinated, heart worm negative and "ready to go" right away for opportunities. She's going to check all the boxes of an easy care friend for your home.

Come on by and meet her. She's advocated for by her friends at ClassicCaninesATX who give an extra level of care and support for the mature dogs that are often the most rounded choices.

name: Stormy
description_html: Shadow & Stormy are a bonded pair and love each other very much! They should be adopted together.

name: Shadow
description_html: Shadow & Stormy are a bonded pair and love each other very much! They should be adopted together.

name: Dawson
description_html:
Dawson is a hoot! When he arrived at AAS, he was unable to use his left front limb, and he was very weak in both of his rear limbs. When examined by our DVMs, it appeared as though he was shot and the pellet is very close to his cervical spine. This would explain the temporary weakness in his legs.

We moved Dawson into a foster home for observation and PT. After a few months, his rear legs are normal, and his front limb is slowly improving. He is starting to put weight on this limb, although he still doesn't walk on it much.

Dawson is energetic, social, and playful. He climbs cat trees, and his front limb doesn’t bother him. We believe that it will continue to improve with time. Nerve tingling is a possibility in the future, but he has not experienced any such issues while being monitored at the shelter or in foster.

Dawson wants a home where he can run and play (with or without a cat buddy), and get plenty of love and affection when he’s between play sessions.

I am a DHC, and I have my own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Dawson and ALL Desperate Housecats!

name: Joyce
description_html:
Tabitha and Joyce have been together since they were kittens. Their only owner recently passed away, so they are understandably confused about being at AAS.

They are described as playful, friendly, and cuddly. Tabitha is curious and smart; she loves to look out the window and watch people and birds. Joyce is more independent, and a little shy. She will follow you around, and will come to you when she wants affection.

Tabitha and Joyce like to be brushed, and can be picked up and held. Because they are older and have been through a lot, we would LOVE to see them out of the shelter, either through adoption or foster.

We are a bonded pair of DHCs, and we have our own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Tabitha, Joyce, and ALL Desperate Housecats!

name: Tabitha
description_html:
Tabitha and Joyce have been together since they were kittens. Their only owner recently passed away, so they are understandably confused about being at AAS.

They are described as playful, friendly, and cuddly. Tabitha is curious and smart; she loves to look out the window and watch people and birds. Joyce is more independent, and a little shy. She will follow you around, and will come to you when she wants affection.

Tabitha and Joyce like to be brushed, and can be picked up and held. Because they are older and have been through a lot, we would LOVE to see them out of the shelter, either through adoption or foster.

We are a bonded pair of DHCs, and we have our own webpage!

The adoption fee is waived for Tabitha, Joyce, and ALL Desperate Housecats!

name: Jojo
description_html:
Sweetly shy Jojo is a medium sized dog of just 35 lbs. He's currently staying with a mature lady named Princesa. They enjoy each other's company while waiting for the next chapter of their lives to unfold.


Jojo is neutered, vaccinated and ready to go to home opportunities right away. He'll appreciate most having kindness and gentle people and dog friends in his sphere of life.


See his little intro video here where he's hamming it up with his kennel side friend Princesa

name: Razzle (Razzi) Dazzle
description_html: Love cuddles and pets. Her voice is a bit raspy but she loves to say hello. Due to a bullet wound to her chest/shoulder area, she had to get an arm removed. She is a lovely tri-pod who is learning to walk again. She is growing in her confidence, good with other cats (non confrontational), and ridiculously sweet. She is still flinches when someone tries to pet her, but she falls right into the love when she realizes she’s safe.

name: Michii
description_html:
Michii came to us after being found injured and brought in by one of our Animal Protection Officers. She had suffered a painful degloving injury to her tail—ouch! Thankfully, our amazing veterinary team was able to help. While spaying her, they also amputated the damaged portion of her tail, leaving her with the cutest little nub.


And Michii? She hasn't let any of it dampen her spirit. This sweet girl is incredibly friendly and loves people. In fact, getting a good photo of her is nearly impossible because she's always busy asking for pets, head scratches, and affection. If you're nearby, don't be surprised if she immediately tries to make you her new best friend.


Michii has been through a lot, but she's ready to leave her past behind and start her next chapter with a family of her own. All she wants is a safe home, plenty of love, and someone to cuddle.

Could that someone be you?

name: Annabelle
description_html: Hola - do you like my name? People tell me it reminds them of an old fashioned diner with hotdogs and hamburgers, and rootbeer floats! I can't wait to be welcomed to a home and maybe get to go fun places like that. My friends here tell me I need a chance to get more food and I know I could sure use a place to stretch out my belly and get quiet rest, maybe right next to my people. Wouldn't that be nice? I'm the kind of lady who loves being with everyone, like smushy in your face style - I'm an entertainer by spirit for you and your friends. Here I am with my friends here. Us older ladies, you know, we sometimes have a little baggage-hope you don't mind I come with some interesting danglers that aren't as pretty as earrings but they are uniquely me. And honestly I had no money for my skincare and things got a little dicey for a while but I'm improving already. I hope you believe in me cuz I believe in you! If I tickled your funny bone I hope to see you soon- Love, Annabelle

name: Timothee
description_html:
Timothée came to the shelter with his beloved sibling, a beautiful Siamese kitten. The two were inseparable—always curled up together, grooming each other, and providing comfort and companionship through every day. As often happens, his Siamese sibling was adopted almost immediately. But Timothée is still waiting.


Now this sweet boy spends his days without the companion he adored, wondering when it will be his turn to find a family. It's hard not to feel for him when you see him sitting alone after having always had a best friend by his side.


This affectionate kitten deserves a home where he'll be cherished, spoiled, and never have to feel lonely again. Could you be the person who gives Timothée the happy ending he's been waiting for?
